# `.code` → Python 伪代码映射表

> 自动生成于 2026-07-09 08:19
> 共分析 112 个 `.code` 文件

---

## 总结构

```
顶层代码 (on mod load, executes once):
    - 变量初始化
    - _save 持久化
    - CreateThread('main')  →  启动 main: 标签
    - CreateThread('...')    →  启动子线程

标签定义 (label:):
    - main:     主入口 (由顶层 CreateThread 触发)
    - stepN:    状态步骤 (由 thread.Goto 跳入)
    - xxx:      函数 (由 label(args) 直接调用)
    - xxx:      监听器 (由 CreateListener 每帧调用)
    - callback:  回调 (由 Gallery 等调用)
```

#### `MakeAnonymityTable:` (14 行)

> 首行: `thread = _this`

```python

thread = _this
table = CreateList()
table.array = CreateList()


table[ "EyeMask"] = CreateList()
table[ "EyeMask"].name = "EyeMask"
table[ "EyeMask"].face = CreateList(mouth=0,eyes=1,hair=0)
table[ "EyeMask"].index = table.array.Count()
table[ "EyeMask"].co = CreateCondition("AdultToy_EyeMask", table.array.Count() )
table.array.Insert( table["EyeMask"] )


```

#### `AppendAnonymityTable:` (25 行)

> 首行: `if t == null`

```python
if t == null:
        t = _args[0]
        if c == null:
                c = _args[1]
                if face == null:
                        face = _args[2]


if t[c] != null:

t[c].face = face
else:
        t[c] = CreateList()
        t[c].name = c
        t[c].face = face
        t[c].index = t.array.Count()
        t[c].co = CreateCondition("Cosplay_"+c, t.array.Count())
        t.array.Insert( t[c])

return t





```

#### `CheckAnonymity:` (49 行)

> 首行: `if table == null`

```python
if table == null:
        table = _args[0]

cm = 0
ce = 0
ch = 0
anonymity = 0
i = table.array.Count()-1
while i>=0:

if table.array[i].co.Check():
        cm = Max(cm, table.array[i].face.mouth)
        ce = Max(ce, table.array[i].face.eyes)
        ch = Max(ch, table.array[i].face.hair)
        Log(" < " + i +" "+ table.array[i].name )
        i-=1


if cm>0:
        if ce>0 || ch>0:
                anonymity = (cm+ce+ch)/3
                Log(" < anonymity : " + anonymity)
                elif ce>0:
                        if cm>0 || ch>0:
                                anonymity = (cm+ce+ch)/3
                                Log(" < anonymity : " + anonymity)
                                elif ch>0:
                                        if cm>0 || ce>0:
                                                anonymity = (cm+ce+ch)/3
                                                Log(" < anonymity : " + anonymity)
                                                Log("CheckAnonymity > Finished: " + anonymity)
                                                return anonymity

















```

#### `MakeScoreTable:` (18 行)

> 首行: `table = CreateList()`

```python


table = CreateList()
table.array = CreateList()


table[ "[CoatDropped,Exposed_All]"] = CreateList()
table[ "[CoatDropped,Exposed_All]"].name = "[CoatDropped,Exposed_All]"
table[ "[CoatDropped,Exposed_All]"].rp = 50
table[ "[CoatDropped,Exposed_All]"].index =  table.array.Count()
table[ "[CoatDropped,Exposed_All]"].co = CreateCondition("[CoatDropped,Exposed_All]", table.array.Count() )
table[ "[CoatDropped,Exposed_All]"].guiName = "Coat Dropped"
table.array.Insert( table["[CoatDropped,Exposed_All]"] )


return table


```

#### `AppendScoreTable:` (26 行)

> 首行: `if t == null`

```python
if t == null:
        t = _args[0]
        if c == null:
                c = _args[1]
                if rp == null:
                        rp = _args[2]
                        if guiName == null:
                                guiName = _args[3]


if t[c] != null:

t[c].rp = rp
else:
        t[c] = CreateList()
        t[c].name = c
        if guiName != null:
                t[c].guiName = guiName

t[c].rp = rp
t[c].index = t.array.Count()
t[c].co = CreateCondition(c, t.array.Count())
t.array.Insert( t[ c])

return t

```

#### `OutputScoreTableNames:` (13 行)

```python
if t == null:
        t = _args[0]

out = CreateList()
i = scoreTable.array.Count()-1
while i>=0:
        out.Insert(scoreTable.array[i].name)
        i-=1

return out
```

#### `ScoreSnapshotData:` (45 行)

> 首行: `thread = _this`

```python
thread = _this
if sTable == null:
        Log("! Warning : ScoreSnapshotData : sTable null !")
        sTable = _args[0]
        if ssd == null:
                ssd = _args[1]

out = CreateList()
out["rp"] = 0
out["best"] = ""
rp = 0
highestScore = 0
highestName = ""
return 0

Log("> ScoreSnapshotData starting: ")

if Find(ssd.Position.stage, "Apart") == -1 && ssd.Conditions.name.Count()>0:

i = ssd.Conditions.name.Count()-1

while i>=0:

Log(" < Condition found: " + ssd.Conditions.name[i])

vis = Max(0, Min(ssd.Conditions.visibility[i],1) )
Log("vis " + vis)
if vis > 0:

basis = sTable[ ssd.Conditions.name[i] ].rp
if basis > highestScore:

highestScore = Max(highestScore,basis)
highestName = ssd.Conditions.name[i]

if sTable[ssd.Conditions.name[i]].guiName!=null:
        highestName = sTable[ssd.Conditions.name[i]].guiName
        Log("sTable highest name : "+highestName)
        else:
                Log("sTable name not found : "+ssd.Conditions.name[i])

rp +=  Round(basis * vis)
Log(" < Score added: "+ ssd.Conditions.name[i] +" : "+ Round( (sTable[ ssd.Conditions.name[i] ].rp * vis)) )
i-=1

```

#### `exit:` (12 行)

> 首行: `_result = rp`

```python

return rp


out.best = highestName
out.rp = rp
return out





```

#### `ConditionsToSnapshotData:` (161 行)

> 首行: `thread = _this`

```python
thread = _this
if ssd == null:
        ssd = _args[0]
        if ssd == null:
                Log("Error : ConditionsToSnapshotData : ssd null")
                thread.goto('exit')  # state transition
                if sTable == null:
                        sTable = _args[1]
                        if sTable == null:
                                Log("Error : ConditionsToSnapshotData : sTable null")
                                thread.goto('exit')  # state transition
                                if requireExposure == null:
                                        requireExposure = False
                                        exposed = False
                                        elif requireExposure:
                                                exposed = conExposedAny.Check()


out = Copy(ssd, deepCopy = true)
out.Conditions = CreateList()
out.Conditions.name = CreateList()
out.Conditions.dict = CreateList()
out.Conditions.visibility = CreateList()
out.State = _state

tVis = 0

if requireExposure && !exposed:
        Log("ConditionsToSnapshotData : exposure required, but not exposing!")
        i = -1
        elif conFP.Check():
                Log("ConditionsToSnapshotData : First person camera used, exiting!")
                i = -1
                else:
                        i = sTable.array.Count()-1

while i>=0:






cVis = 0
cNotVis = 0
cBonus = 1
cAngleBonus = 0
if conCosplayNeg.Check():
        cNotVis+=visNegPenalty

c = sTable.array[i].co

check = c.Check()
if c.Check():
        Log(sTable.array[i].name+" : ConditionsToSnapshotData > Condition Valid, Processing Visibility : ")
        if Find("Expos", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0 || Find("Vis_", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0:


if conNaked.Check():
        cBonus+=visNudityBonus
        if conVisPose.Check() && Find("Vis_Pose", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0:
                cBonus+=visPoseBonus
                if Find("Vis_Med", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0:
                        cBonus+=visMedBonus
                        if Find("Vis_High", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0:
                                cBonus+=visHighBonus
                                if Find("Vis_Neg", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0:
                                        cNotVis+=visNegPenalty

cAngleBonus = cBonus-1
modifiedFacingThreshold = viewThresholds.facing - cAngleBonus
Log(" < modifiedFacingThreshold : " + modifiedFacingThreshold)
Log(" < cAngleBonus : " + cAngleBonus)

if viewCurrent.facing < -modifiedFacingThreshold:
        Log(" < Facing camera, checking : _Front")
        if Find("_Front", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0:

vis = Max(0, Abs(viewCurrent.facing*viewCurrent.facing*cBonus)-modifiedFacingThreshold )
cVis = Max(vis,cVis)
Log(" << Visible : _Front : " + viewCurrent.facing)
else:
        if Find("_Front", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0:
                cNotVis+=visFlatPenalty
                Log(" << Not Visible, facing wrong way : _Front : " + viewCurrent.facing)
                Log(" < Facing away, skipped : _Front")


if viewCurrent.body > -cAngleBonus:
        Log(" < Body Focus, checking : _Upper")
        if Find( "_Upper", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0:
                vis = Max(viewCurrent.body*Abs(viewCurrent.facing),viewCurrent.body*viewCurrent.head)*cBonus
                cVis = Max(vis,cVis)
                Log(" << Visible : _Upper : " + viewCurrent.body)
                else:
                        if Find( "_Upper", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0:
                                cNotVis+=visFlatPenalty
                                Log(" << Body not in focus : _Upper : " + viewCurrent.body)


if viewCurrent.crotch > -cAngleBonus:
        Log(" < Crotch Focus, checking facing : _HipCrouch and _Hip")

if viewCurrent.facing > modifiedFacingThreshold:
        Log(" << Facing passed, checking condition : _HipCrouch " + viewCurrent.facing)
        if Find("_HipCrouch", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0:
                if _state.Crouching || _state.Coat.Dropped || conVisPose.Check() || conGroin.Check():
                        Log(" <<< Visible : _HipCrouch : _state.Crouching || _state.Coat.Dropped || conVisPose.Check() || conGroin.Check(): " + viewCurrent.crotch)
                        vis = Max( (viewCurrent.crotch*cBonus), (Abs(viewCurrent.facing*cBonus)-modifiedFacingThreshold) )
                        cVis = Max(vis,cVis)
                        else:
                                cNotVis+=visFlatPenalty
                                Log(" <<< Not visible : _HipCrouch : _state.Crouching || _state.Coat.Dropped || _state.Coat.Back  : " + viewCurrent.crotch)

if viewCurrent.facing < -modifiedFacingThreshold && conBreast.Check():
        Log(" < Facing towards/away from camera, checking for condition : _Hip : " + viewCurrent.facing)
        if Find("_Hip", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0:
                Log(" << Hip in focus, front is exposed, and facing towards : _Hip : " + viewCurrent.crotch)
                vis = (viewCurrent.crotch + Abs(viewCurrent.facing*cBonus)-modifiedFacingThreshold)/2 *cBonus
                cVis = Max(vis,cVis)
                elif viewCurrent.facing > modifiedFacingThreshold && conGroin.Check():
                        if Find("_Hip", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0:
                                Log(" << Hip in focus, rear is exposed, and facing away : _Hip : " + viewCurrent.crotch)
                                vis = (viewCurrent.crotch + Abs(viewCurrent.facing*cBonus)-modifiedFacingThreshold)/2 *cBonus
                                cVis = Max(vis,cVis)
                                elif Find("_HipCrouch", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0 || Find("_Hip", sTable.array[i].name) >= 0:
                                        cNotVis+=visFlatPenalty
                                        Log(" << Facing failed : _HipCrouch,_Hip : viewCurrent.facing : " + viewCurrent.facing)
                                        Log(" << Facing failed : _HipCrouch,_Hip : modifiedFacingThreshold : " + modifiedFacingThreshold)


if viewCurrent.head > -cAngleBonus && viewCurrent.facing < cAngleBonus:
        if Find("Vis_Face",sTable.array[i].name) >= 0:
                vis = viewCurrent.head
                cVis = Max(vis,cVis)



if Find("Futa", sTable.array[i].name) > 0 && Find("_HipCrouch", sTable.array[i].name)>= 0:
        if viewCurrent.facing < cAngleBonus+0.1:
                vis = Max( viewCurrent.crotch*viewCurrent.crotch, Abs(viewCurrent.facing))*cBonus
                cVis = Max(vis,cVis)
                Log(" < Futa Visible : " + Max( viewCurrent.crotch, Abs(viewCurrent.facing)) )

Log(" < cNotvis : "+ cNotVis)
cVis-=cNotVis
Log(" < cVis : "+ cVis)
else:
        cVis = 1

if cVis > 0:
        out.Conditions.name.Insert( sTable.array[i].name )
        out.Conditions.visibility.Insert( Max(1,cVis) )
        out.Conditions.dict[sTable.array[i].name] = cVis



tVis+=cVis


i-=1
```

#### `exit:` (341 行)

> 首行: `_result = null`

```python
return null
Log("ConditionsToSnapshotData > Finished : Total visibility= " + tVis)

return out





conFP = CreateCondition("FPCamera")

conExposedAny = CreateCondition("[!Exposed_None,(Exposed_All,Exposed_Front,Exposed_Upper,Exposed_Hip,[Crouching,Exposed_HipCrouch])]", id="Exposed_Any")

conTagVisHack = CreateCondition("(SubCondition_Vis_Groin,Exposed_Hip,Exposed_Upper,Exposed_Front)", id="Front_Upper_HipCrouch_Exposed_")

conNone = CreateCondition("Exposed_None", id="None")

conGroin = CreateCondition("[Exposed_HipCrouch,(Crouching,Exposed_Hip,!Action_None)]", id="Vis_Groin")

conBreast = CreateCondition("[(CoatDropped,CoatFrontOpen1,CoatFrontOpen2),(Exposed_Front,Exposed_Upper,!Action_None,Crouching)]", id="Vis_Breast")

conNaked = CreateCondition("[CoatDropped,Exposed_All,!Bodypaint,!Invisible]", id="Vis_Naked")

conCoatOpen = CreateCondition("(CoatDropped,CoatFrontOpen1,CoatFrontOpen2,CoatBackOpen)", id="Coat_Open")

conVisPose = CreateCondition("[!Action_None,NoHandcuffs,!Moving,!Crouching,!Sitting]", id="Vis_Pose")


conTagVisMed = CreateCondition("!Exposed_None", id="Vis_Med")
conCosplayVisMed = CreateCondition("(Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_upper_nip_piasu,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_upper_nippless,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_upper_cross_piasu,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_genital_gentle_hand,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_genital_rubbit_tail,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_genital_ninjin,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_genital_beads,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_upper_condom,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_upper_gentle_hand)", id="Cos_Med")


conTagVisHigh = CreateCondition("!Exposed_None", id="Vis_High")
conCosplayVisHigh = CreateCondition("(Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_genital_tail_plug,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_genital_plug_light,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_upper_kanban)", id="Cos_High")


conTagVisNeg = CreateCondition("!Exposed_None", id="Vis_Neg")

conCosplayNeg = CreateCondition("(Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_upper_rain_coat,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_upper_rubber_suit)", id="Cos_Neg")


conTagVisFace = CreateCondition("!Exposed_None", id="Vis_Face")


conCosplayExposedFace = CreateCondition("!(Blindfolded,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_head_mask,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_head_glasses,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_head_sun_glasses,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_head_eye_censor,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_head_mekakushi,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_head_houtai,Cosplay_m_cosplay_ninja_mask,Cosplay_m_cosplay_sister_face,Cosplay_m_cosplay_latex_pony_full_face)", id="Exposed_Face")

conCosplayLewdFace = CreateCondition("(Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_head_osyaburi,Cosplay_m_cosplay_general_head_kuchikase,Cosplay_m_cosplay_latex_pony_head)", id="Lewd_Face")





conCosplaySet_Jumpsuit = CreateCondition("[Cosplay_m_cosplay_jump_suit_suit,Cosplay_m_cosplay_jump_suit_boots]", id="Set_Jumpsuit")

conCosplaySet_Guard = CreateCondition("[Cosplay_m_cosplay_jailer_cap,Cosplay_m_cosplay_jailer_jacket,Cosplay_m_cosplay_jailer_reotard,Cosplay_m_cosplay_jailer_pants,Cosplay_m_cosplay_jailer_bag,Cosplay_m_cosplay_jailer_boots]", id="Set_Guard")

conCosplaySet_Cowgirl = CreateCondition("[Cosplay_m_cosplay_cow_hair_band,Cosplay_m_cosplay_cow_choker,Cosplay_m_cosplay_cow_glove,Cosplay_m_cosplay_cow_bra,Cosplay_m_cosplay_cow_pants,Cosplay_m_cosplay_cow_tail,Cosplay_m_cosplay_cow_boots]", id="Set_Cowgirl")

conCosplaySet_WildBeast = CreateCondition("[Cosplay_m_cosplay_wild_neck_mohu,Cosplay_m_cosplay_wild_belt,Cosplay_m_cosplay_wild_nippless_mohu,Cosplay_m_cosplay_wild_hand_mohu,Cosplay_m_cosplay_wild_pants,Cosplay_m_cosplay_wild_upper_leg_mohu,Cosplay_m_cosplay_wild_foot_mohu]", id="Set_WildBeast")

conCosplaySet_SuitA = CreateCondition("[(Cosplay_m_cosplay_suit_chic_shirt,Cosplay_m_cosplay_suit_chic_jacket,Cosplay_m_cosplay_suit_chic_skirt,Cosplay_m_cosplay_suit_chic_pants),Cosplay_m_cosplay_suit_chic_card,Cosplay_m_cosplay_suit_chic_panty,Cosplay_m_cosplay_suit_chic_shoes]", id="Set_SuitA")

conCosplaySet_SuitB = CreateCondition("[(Cosplay_m_cosplay_suit_luxe_jacket,Cosplay_m_cosplay_suit_luxe_tops,Cosplay_m_cosplay_suit_luxe_pants),Cosplay_m_cosplay_suit_luxe_chorker,Cosplay_m_cosplay_suit_luxe_shoes]", id="Set_SuitB")

conCosplaySet_DownJacket = CreateCondition("[(Cosplay_m_cosplay_glossy_jacket,Cosplay_m_cosplay_glossy_knit),Cosplay_m_cosplay_glossy_boots]", id="Set_DownJacket")

conCosplaySet_SchoolUniformA = CreateCondition("[(Cosplay_m_cosplay_school_hoodie_hoodie,Cosplay_m_cosplay_school_hoodie_shirt,Cosplay_m_cosplay_school_hoodie_skirt),(Cosplay_m_cosplay_school_hoodie_ribbon,Cosplay_m_cosplay_school_hoodie_necktie),Cosplay_m_cosplay_school_hoodie_bag,Cosplay_m_cosplay_school_hoodie_socks,Cosplay_m_cosplay_school_hoodie_shoes]", id="Set_SchoolUniformA")

conCosplaySet_TacticalMaid = CreateCondition("[(Cosplay_m_cosplay_maid_apron,Cosplay_m_cosplay_maid_onepiece),Cosplay_m_cosplay_maid_choker,Cosplay_m_cosplay_maid_sleeve,Cosplay_m_cosplay_maid_harness_belt,Cosplay_m_cosplay_maid_ribbon,Cosplay_m_cosplay_maid_bag,Cosplay_m_cosplay_maid_stocking,Cosplay_m_cosplay_maid_ankle_belt,Cosplay_m_cosplay_maid_shoes]", id="Set_TacticalMaid")
```

## `ExibitionDaily.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\CameraFlash\ExibitionDaily.code`

### 标签

#### `ED:` (6 行)

> 首行: `thread = _this`

```python
thread = _this

chat = CreateMessengerChat("Camera开放日报社", iconcolor = Color(1,2,0), icontext = "SA", icontextcolor = Color(1,1,1))

thread.goto('step1')  # state transition

```

#### `step1:` (6 行)

> 首行: `chat.Add("你好，米歇尔说你就是我需要的女孩", "Left", user="萨曼达", silent=true)`

```python
chat.Add("你好，米歇尔说你就是我需要的女孩", "Left", user="萨曼达", silent=true)
chat.Add("准备好开始公开露出了吗？", "Left", user="", silent=true)

chat.SetButtons("准备好了")

listener = create_listener("EDWait")
```

#### `EDWait:` (3 行)

> 首行: `if chat.Clicked() != null`

```python
if chat.Clicked() != null:
        thread.goto('step2')  # state transition

```

#### `step2:` (8 行)

> 首行: `listener = null`

```python
listener = null
chat.SetButtons()
chatdata = CreateList()
chatdata[0] = CreateList(text="准备好了", align="Right", user="", delay=0)
chatdata[1] = CreateList(text="米歇尔给我看过你的正面照，也让我看看你的背面照吧", align="Left", user="萨曼达", delay=1)
chatdata[2] = CreateList(text="*露出屁股拍照*", align="Right", user="委托目标", delay=1)
thread.goto('chatoutput')  # state transition

```

#### `step2a:` (4 行)

> 首行: `chat.SetButtons("打开相册")`

```python

thread.goto('selectimage')  # state transition

```

#### `selectimage:` (5 行)

> 首行: `gallery = CreateGallery("gallery_callback")`

```python
listener = create_listener("waitforbutton1")
listener2 = create_listener("waitforconfirm1")

```

#### `gallery_callback:` (3 行)

> 首行: `if data.Exposed.Hip`

```python

        return true

```

#### `waitforbutton1:` (3 行)

```python

        gallery.Show()

```

#### `waitforconfirm1:` (5 行)

> 首行: `if gallery.Confirmed()`

```python
if gallery.Confirmed():
        selection = gallery.GetSelection()
        if selection.Count()>0:
                chat.SetButtons()
                thread.goto('step3')  # state transition
```

#### `step3:` (10 行)

> 首行: `chat.Add(image, "Right", silent=true)`

```python
chat.Add(image, "Right", silent=true)

chatdata = CreateList()
chatdata[0] = CreateList(text="这张可以吗？", align="Right", user="", delay=1)
chatdata[1] = CreateList(text="不错，接下来让我正式开始说明", align="Left", user="萨曼达", delay=2)
chatdata[2] = CreateList(text="我为开放日报社工作，专门为裸体主义者和变态服务，广受好评", align="Left", user="", delay=2)
chatdata[3] = CreateList(text="你必须穿着外套拍摄，但禁止任何服装，允许戴个口罩来遮住脸", align="Left", user="", delay=2)
chatdata[4] = CreateList(text="所有照片都必须在公开场所，我们不接受在私密场所拍摄的照片", align="Left", user="", delay=3)
thread.goto('chatoutput')  # state transition

```

#### `step4:` (3 行)

> 首行: `chat.SetButtons("我知道了，那么我要具体拍什么照片？")`

```python
chat.SetButtons("我知道了，那么我要具体拍什么照片？")

listener = create_listener("EDWait")
```

#### `EDWait:` (2 行)

> 首行: `if chat.Clicked() != null`

```python

        thread.goto('step5')  # state transition
```

#### `step5:` (9 行)

> 首行: `chat.SetButtons("")`

```python
chat.SetButtons("")
chatdata = CreateList()
chatdata[0] = CreateList(text="我知道了，那么我要具体拍什么照片？", align="Right", user="", delay=0)
chatdata[1] = CreateList(text="想象一下，在空无一人的深夜街道，你穿着外套沐浴在灯光下，寒冷的晚风吹拂着你的肌肤", align="Left", user="萨曼达", delay=1)
chatdata[2] = CreateList(text="我想要几张晚上你在住宅区拍摄的暴露照片", align="Left", user="", delay=3)
```

#### `delay:` (17 行)

> 首行: `if time == null`

```python
if time == null:
        time = 0
        time = time + _timediff
        if time > duration:
                if data[index].text != null:
                        if data[index].user == null:
                                chat.Add(data[index].text, data[index].align, silent=true)
                                else:
                                        chat.Add(data[index].text, data[index].align, user=data[index].user, silent=true)
                                        if data[index+1] != null:
                                                thread.goto('chatoutput')  # state transition
                                                else:
                                                        thread.goto(nextstep)  # state transition




```

---

## `FansChat.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\FansChat\FansChat.code`

### 顶层代码 (on load)

```python





































conditionScoreScale = 0.1
scoreFansScale = 0.1
scoreWhales = 0.3
scoreWhalesRequest = 100
fans = 10
fansBump = 10
whales = 0
whaleBumpChance = 0.1
viewThresholdFacing = 0.33
viewThresholdHead = 0.7
viewThresholdBody = 0.8
viewThresholdCrotch = 0.7
anonThreshold = 0.32


nextPayout = 0
galleryRPSum = 0
viewThresholds = CreateList(facing=viewThresholdFacing,head=viewThresholdHead,body=viewThresholdBody,crotch=viewThresholdCrotch)
viewCurrent = CreateList(facing=-1.0,head=-1.0,body=-1.0,crotch=-1.0)
anon = 0
chatOpenAlready = False


scoreTable = DefaultScoreTable()
anonTable = DefaultAnonymityTable()
mainthread = create_thread("main")


```

### 标签

#### `debugloop:` (8 行)

> 首行: `if duration == null`

```python
if duration == null:
        duration = 0
        duration = duration + _timediff

if duration > 0.5:
        Log("_state.Action : " + _state.Action)
        duration = 0

```

#### `main:` (7 行)

> 首行: `thread = _this`

```python
thread = _this


chat = CreateMessengerChat("FansChat", iconcolor = Color(1,0,0.5), icontext = "( · )( · )", icontextcolor = Color(1,0,0.5))

thread.goto('step1')  # state transition

```

#### `step1:` (10 行)

> 首行: `galleryRPSum = 0`

```python

galleryRPSum = 0

chat.Add("粉丝数:" + fans, "Left", silent=true)
chat.SetButtons("上传自拍")



listener = create_listener("waitforbutton")

```

#### `waitforbutton:` (9 行)

> 首行: `if chat.Clicked() != null`

```python
if chat.Clicked() != null:


if Find("Apart",_state.Position.stage) >= 0:
        thread.goto('homeWarning')  # state transition
        else:
                thread.goto('photoNowTake')  # state transition


```

#### `photoNowTake:` (62 行)

> 首行: `chat.Clear()`

```python
chat.Clear()

anon = 0


focusHead = InFocus_Head()
if focusHead > viewThresholdHead:




v = focusHead
inMin = viewThresholdHead
inMax = 1.0
outMin = 0.0
outMax = 1.0



v = Max(v,inMin)
v = Min(v,inMax)


a = (outMax-outMin)*(v-inMin)

b = (inMax-inMin)+outMin

c = a/b

viewCurrent.head=c
else:
        viewCurrent.head=-1.0

viewCurrent.facing = ManakaDotCamera()



if viewCurrent.head>0.5 && viewCurrent.facing<0:
        anon = CheckAnonymity(anonTable)

else:
        anon = 1

chat.SetButtons()
camDir = Vector3Rotate(_state.Camera, Vector(0,0,1))


camPos = Vector(_state.Camera.x, _state.Camera.y, _state.Camera.z)
targetPos = Vector(_state.CameraTarget.Body.x, _state.CameraTarget.Body.y, _state.CameraTarget.Body.z)

snapshotobject = CreateSnapshot(position = _state.Camera, direction = camDir, width = 512, height = 512, fov = 60)



if anon>=anonThreshold:
        thread.goto('photoNowSend')  # state transition
        elif anon<anonThreshold:
                Log("Not anonymous enough !")
                thread.goto('refusePhoto')  # state transition
                snapshotobject = null


```

#### `photoNowSend:` (8 行)

> 首行: `file = sso.Save(hidden = false)`

```python

file = sso.Save(hidden = false)
sso = null

chat.Add(file, "Right", user="香菜酱", silent=true)
DeleteSnapshot(file)
thread.goto('scorePhoto')  # state transition

```

#### `scorePhoto:` (174 行)

> 首行: `photo = GetSnapshotData(imageRef)`

```python
photo = GetSnapshotData(imageRef)
Log("scorePhoto " + photo)
PlaySoundEffect("UiDecide", 0.5)


viewCurrent.facing = ManakaDotCamera()


focusBody = InFocus_Body()
if focusBody> viewThresholdBody:


v = focusBody
inMin = viewThresholdBody
inMax = 1.0
outMin = 0.0
outMax = 1.0



v = Max(v,inMin)
v = Min(v,inMax)


a = (outMax-outMin)*(v-inMin)

b = (inMax-inMin)+outMin

c = a/b

viewCurrent.body=c
else:
        viewCurrent.body=-1.0


focusCrotch = InFocus_Crotch()
if focusCrotch > viewThresholdCrotch:


v = focusCrotch
inMin = viewThresholdCrotch
inMax = 1.0
outMin = 0.0
outMax = 1.0



v = Max(v,inMin)
v = Min(v,inMax)


a = (outMax-outMin)*(v-inMin)

b = (inMax-inMin)+outMin

c = a/b

viewCurrent.crotch=c
else:
        viewCurrent.crotch=-1.0


focusHead = InFocus_Head()
if focusHead > viewThresholdHead:


v = focusHead
inMin = viewThresholdHead
inMax = 1.0
outMin = 0.0
outMax = 1.0



v = Max(v,inMin)
v = Min(v,inMax)


a = (outMax-outMin)*(v-inMin)

b = (inMax-inMin)+outMin

c = a/b

viewCurrent.head=c
else:
        viewCurrent.head=-1.0


photo = ConditionsToSnapshotData( ssd=photo, sTable=scoreTable, requireExposure=true )



resultData = ScoreSnapshotData(sTable=scoreTable, ssd=photo)
basis = Max(0, resultData.rp )
basis *= conditionScoreScale
Log("Basis: " + basis)
Log("Best: "+ resultData.best)
bestName = resultData.best



risk = 0.1
if !conNone.Check():
        risk = (photo.Detection + photo.RpBonus)/2
        Log("Risk: " + risk)


fanScore = fans*scoreFansScale
fanScore += (whales * scoreWhales)
Log("fanScore: " + fanScore)


score = 0
if basis > 0:
        score = (basis+fanScore) * risk
        Log("Score: " + score)

nextPayout = score
if score > 0:
        nextPayout = Ceil(nextPayout)
        Log("nextPayout: " + nextPayout)


newFans = 0
if score > 0:
        fansHype = fans*risk
        fansDiff = fansHype-fans
        if fansDiff<0:
                Log(" ! Warning : Potential loss of fans due to low hype!")
                newFans = Round( Min(fansBump*risk, Round(Random(fansDiff, fansBump*risk)) ))
                fans += newFans



startf = 0
endf = 0
roundA = Find("(", bestName)
roundB = Find(")", bestName)
squareA = Find("[", bestName)
squareB = Find("]", bestName)
comma = Find(",", bestName)


wip_startf = 0
if roundA<=2:
        wip_startf = Max(wip_startf,roundA+1)
        if squareA<=2:
                wip_startf = Max(wip_startf,squareA+1)
                startf = wip_startf


wip_endf = Length(bestName)-1
if comma > 0:
        wip_endf = Min(wip_endf,comma)
        if roundB > 0:
                wip_endf = Min(wip_endf,roundB)
                if squareB > 0:
                        wip_endf = Min(wip_endf,squareB)
                        endf = Max(startf+1, wip_endf)

chatdata = CreateList()

chatdata[0] = CreateList(text="" + nextPayout + "RP收益", align="Left", user="", delay=0.5)
chatdata[1] = CreateList(text="新增了" + newFans + "个粉丝!", align="Left", user="", delay=0.5)



if Length(bestName)>1 && endf>startf:
        bestName = SubString(bestName, start=startf, end=endf)
        chatdata[2] = CreateList(text="粉丝转发了你的" + bestName + "照片", align="Left", user="", delay=0.5)
        thread.goto('chatoutput')  # state transition


```

#### `awardRp:` (4 行)

> 首行: `AddCurrentEarnRP(nextPayout)`

```python
AddCurrentEarnRP(nextPayout)
PlaySoundEffect("UICompleteMission", 0.5)
thread.goto('step1')  # state transition

```

#### `refusePhoto:` (5 行)

> 首行: `chat.Clear()`

```python
chat.Clear()
chatdata = CreateList()
chatdata[0] = CreateList(text="我必须使用服装把面部完全遮住", align="Right", user="", delay=0)
thread.goto('chatoutput')  # state transition

```

#### `homeWarning:` (5 行)

> 首行: `chat.Clear()`

```python
chat.Clear()
chatdata = CreateList()
chatdata[0] = CreateList(text="如果在家里拍照，我肯定会被开盒", align="Right", user="", delay=0)
thread.goto('chatoutput')  # state transition

```

#### `chatoutput:` (5 行)

> 首行: `if index == null`

```python

if index == null:
        index = 0
        listener = create_listener("delay", duration=data[index].delay)

```

#### `delay:` (16 行)

> 首行: `if time == null`

```python
if time == null:
        time = 0
        time = time + _timediff
        if time > duration:
                if data[index].text != null:
                        if data[index].user == null:
                                chat.Add(data[index].text, data[index].align, silent=true)
                                else:
                                        chat.Add(data[index].text, data[index].align, user=data[index].user, silent=true)
                                        if data[index+1] != null:
                                                thread.goto('chatoutput')  # state transition
                                                else:
                                                        thread.goto(nextstep)  # state transition



```

## `Futarbar.code`

```python

        thread.goto('step2')  # state transition

```

> 首行: `listener = null`

```python
listener = null
chat.SetButtons()
chatdata = CreateList()
chatdata[0] = CreateList(text="我只接受银行卡汇款", align="Right", user="", delay=0)
chatdata[1] = CreateList(text="吾乃至尊破逼人、扶他小霸王，你竟然不许！", align="Left", user="破逼人", delay=2)
chatdata[2] = CreateList(text="你脑子没问题吧", align="Right", user="", delay=2)
chatdata[3] = CreateList(text="先看看吾变化出的至尊根", align="Left", user="破逼人", delay=2)
chatdata[4] = CreateList(text=GetImageReference("Images/dickpick.jpg"), align="Left", user="", delay=2)
chatdata[5] = CreateList(text="没想到也有我来接收照片的一天", align="Right", user="", delay=2)
chatdata[6] = CreateList(text="*使用扶他药，露出前面在家中拍照*", align="Right", user="委托目标", delay=2)
thread.goto('chatoutput')  # state transition

```

#### `step2a:` (9 行)

> 首行: `chat.SetButtons("打开相册")`

```python

condition = CreateCondition("[!Crouching,Exposed_Front]")
area = CreateArea(type="sphere", stage="Apart", x=0, y=0, z=0, r=1000, outline=false, compass=false)
gallery = CreateGallery("gallery_callback",condition, area)

listener = create_listener("waitforbutton2")
listener2 = create_listener("waitforconfirm2")

```

#### `step3:` (13 行)

> 首行: `chat.Add(image, "Right", silent=true)`

```python
chat.Add(image, "Right", silent=true)
chatdata = CreateList()
chatdata[0] = CreateList(text="看看，我就说我没骗人吧！", align="Left", user="破逼人", delay=1)
chatdata[1] = CreateList(text="但我依然只接受银行卡汇款", align="Right", user="", delay=2)
chatdata[2] = CreateList(text="吾欲让扶他小药丸扬名天下，粒粒能赚得万金", align="Left", user="破逼人", delay=2)
chatdata[3] = CreateList(text="倒是听人说话啊。。算了，直说你想要我做什么吧", align="Right", user="", delay=2)
chatdata[4] = CreateList(text="额，其实我也不知道具体要做什么", align="Left", user="破逼人", delay=3)
chatdata[5] = CreateList(text="那不然我给你些我在街上使用那什么药丸的全裸照片？", align="Right", user="", delay=3)
chatdata[6] = CreateList(text="对对对，但我要更进一步，拍些你在街上向他人射精的照片", align="Left", user="破逼人", delay=2)
chatdata[7] = CreateList(text="那太没素质了，我只能在住宅区拍些简单的照片", align="Right", user="", delay=1)
chatdata[8] = CreateList(text="*使用扶他药，露出前面在白天拍照*", align="Right", user="委托目标", delay=2)
thread.goto('chatoutput')  # state transition

```

## `Michel.code`

```python
thread = _this

thread.goto('step1')  # state transition
```

#### `step1:` (7 行)

> 首行: `chat.Add("您好，我是亚马森客服米歇尔，我注意到您在本站购买了大量色情服装，想邀请您成为我们的模特", "Left", user="米歇尔", silent=true)`

```python

chat.Add("请放心，我们一定会确保您的个人信息安全", "Left", user="", silent=true)

chat.SetButtons("为什么邀请我当模特？")
```

```python
        thread.goto('step2')  # state transition
```

```python
chatdata[1] = CreateList(text="这是我们为老客户回馈的一点心意", align="Left", user="米歇尔", delay=1)
chatdata[2] = CreateList(text="我们会为每张照片支付稿费，并在合同期间为您提供完整的法律保护", align="Left", user="", delay=2)
```

#### `step2a:` (4 行)

> 首行: `chat.SetButtons("好的，我接受")`

```python
position = Vector3Sub(_state.CameraTarget.Face, direction)

thread.goto('step4')  # state transition
```

> 首行: `if index == null`

```python

        index = 0

```

#### `delay:` (14 行)

> 首行: `if time == null`

```python
if time == null:
        time = 0
        time = time + _timediff
        if time > duration:
                if data[index].text != null:
                        if data[index].user == null:
                                chat.Add(data[index].text, data[index].align, silent=true)
                                else:
                                        chat.Add(data[index].text, data[index].align, user=data[index].user, silent=true)
                                        if data[index+1] != null:
                                                thread.goto('chatoutput')  # state transition
                                                else:
                                                        thread.goto(nextstep)  # state transition

```

## `_enhancedDict.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\Lilith's Fun\_enhancedDict.code`

### 标签

#### `DynamicDict:` (9 行)

> 首行: `keyGapCount = 0`

```python


keyGapCount = 0
keyGaps = CreateList()
length = 0
keys = CreateList()
keyIndexes = CreateList()
list = CreateList()

```

#### `At:` (7 行)

> 首行: `if key == null`

```python


if key == null:
        key = _args[0]
        if __IsValidKey(key):
                return list[key]

```

#### `ContainsKey:` (9 行)

> 首行: `if key == null`

```python

if key == null:
        key = _args[0]
        if __IsValidKey(key):
                if keyIndexes[key] != null:
                        return true
                        else:
                                return false

```

#### `Insert:` (20 行)

> 首行: `if key == null`

```python

if key == null:
        key = _args[0]
        if value == null:
                value = _args[1]
                if __IsValidKey(key) && __IsValidValue(value):
                        if keyIndexes[key] == null:
                                lastKeyGapIndex = keyGapCount - 1
                                if lastKeyGapIndex >= 0:
                                        keyGap = keyGaps[lastKeyGapIndex]
                                        keyGaps[lastKeyGapIndex] = null
                                        keyGapCount = lastKeyGapIndex
                                        keys[keyGap] = key
                                        keyIndexes[key] = keyGap
                                        else:
                                                keys[length] = key
                                                keyIndexes[key] = length
                                                length = length + 1
                                                list[key] = value

```

#### `Remove:` (16 行)

> 首行: `if key == null`

```python

if key == null:
        key = _args[0]
        if __IsValidKey(key):
                keyIndex = keyIndexes[key]
                if keyIndex != null:
                        lastKeyIndex = length - 1
                        if keyIndex != lastKeyIndex:
                                keyGaps[keyGapCount] = keyIndex
                                keyGapCount = keyGapCount + 1
                                else:
                                        length = length - 1
                                        keyIndexes[key] = null
                                        keys[keyIndex] = null
                                        list[key] = null

```

#### `Clear:` (11 行)

> 首行: `i = 0`

```python
i = 0
while i < length:
        key = keys[i]
        keyIndexes[key] = null
        list[key] = null
        i = i + 1
```

## `_heap.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\Lilith's Fun\_heap.code`

### 标签

#### `Heap:` (6 行)

> 首行: `list = CreateList()`

```python

list = CreateList()
count = 0
comparator = null

isInit = false
```

#### `Init:` (8 行)

> 首行: `if !isInit`

```python


if !isInit:
        isInit = true
        if newComparator == null:
                newComparator = _args[0]
                comparator = newComparator

```

#### `Offer:` (8 行)

> 首行: `if value == null`

```python

if value == null:
        value = _args[0]
        if value != null:
                list[count] = value
                count = count + 1
                __ShiftUp(count - 1)

```

#### `Peek:` (3 行)

> 首行: `_result = list["0"]`

```python

return list["0"]

```

#### `Poll:` (9 行)

> 首行: `if count > 0`

```python

if count > 0:
        top = list["0"]
        count = count - 1
        list["0"] = list[count]
        list[count] = null
        __ShiftDown(0)
        return top

```

#### `PollAll:` (6 行)

> 首行: `data = CreateList()`

```python

data = CreateList()
while !IsEmpty():
        data.Insert(Poll())
        return data

```

#### `__ShiftUp:` (12 行)

> 首行: `index = _args[0]`

```python

index = _args[0]
while index > 0:
        parentIndex = (index - 1) // 2
        current = list[index]
        parent = list[parentIndex]
        if comparator.compare(a = current, b = parent) < 0:
                __Swap(index, parentIndex)
                index = parentIndex
                else:
                        index = 0

```

#### `__ShiftDown:` (23 行)

> 首行: `index = _args[0]`

```python

index = _args[0]
flag = true
while flag:
        leftChildIndex = 2 * index + 1
        rightChildIndex = 2 * index + 2
        bestChildIndex = index
        leftChild = list[leftChildIndex]
        bestChild = list[bestChildIndex]
        if leftChildIndex < count:
                if comparator.compare(a = leftChild, b = bestChild) < 0:
                        bestChildIndex = leftChildIndex
                        bestChild = list[bestChildIndex]
                        rightChild = list[rightChildIndex]
                        if rightChildIndex < count:
                                if comparator.compare(a = rightChild, b = bestChild) < 0:
                                        bestChildIndex = rightChildIndex
                                        if bestChildIndex == index:
                                                flag = false
                                                else:
                                                        __Swap(index, bestChildIndex)
                                                        index = bestChildIndex

```

#### `__Swap:` (7 行)

> 首行: `index0 = _args[0]`

```python

index0 = _args[0]
index1 = _args[1]
temp = list[index0]
list[index0] = list[index1]
list[index1] = temp

```

#### `IsEmpty:` (6 行)

> 首行: `if count == 0`

```python

if count == 0:
        return true
        else:
                return false

```

#### `GetCount:` (3 行)

> 首行: `_result = count`

```python

return count

```

#### `Clear:` (2 行)

> 首行: `list.Remove(index = 0, count = count)`

```python
list.Remove(index = 0, count = count)

```

#### `IsInit:` (3 行)

> 首行: `_result = isInit`

```python

return isInit

```

#### `BuildFrom:` (18 行)

> 首行: `if sourceList == null`

```python

if sourceList == null:
        sourceList = _args[0]
        Clear()
        if sourceList != null:
                i = 0
                srcCount = sourceList.Count()
                count = srcCount
                while i < srcCount:
                        list[i] = sourceList[i]
                        i = i + 1
                        lastNonLeafIndex = (srcCount - 2)
                        i = lastNonLeafIndex
                        while i >= 0:
                                __ShiftDown(i)
                                i = i - 1


```


> 首行: `_result = a - b`

```python


return a - b

```

> 首行: `_result = b - a`

```python

```

```python
                if valueIndexes[value] == null:
                        lastValueGapIndex = valueGapCount - 1
                        if lastValueGapIndex >= 0:
                                valueGap = valueGaps[lastValueGapIndex]
                                valueGaps[lastValueGapIndex] = null
                                valueGapCount = lastValueGapIndex
                                values[valueGap] = value

        else:
```


#### `Queue:` (7 行)

> 首行: `list = CreateList()`

```python

list = CreateList()
front = 0
rear = 0
count = 0
maxCount = 2

```

#### `SetMaxCount:` (8 行)

> 首行: `if newMaxCount == null`

```python


if newMaxCount == null:
        newMaxCount = _args[0]
        newMaxCount = Trunc(newMaxCount)
        if newMaxCount != null && newMaxCount > count && newMaxCount >= 2:
                __Grow(newMaxCount - maxCount)

```

#### `GetMaxCount:` (3 行)

> 首行: `_result = maxCount`

```python

return maxCount

```

#### `GetCount:` (3 行)

> 首行: `_result = count`

```python

return count

```

#### `IsEmpty:` (6 行)

> 首行: `if front == rear`

```python

if front == rear:
        return true
        else:
                return false

```

#### `IsFull:` (6 行)

> 首行: `if (rear + 1) % maxCount == front`

```python

if (rear + 1) % maxCount == front:
        return true
        else:
                return false

```

#### `Clear:` (8 行)

> 首行: `i = front`

```python
i = front
while i != rear:
        list[i] = null
        i = (i + 1) % maxCount
        front = 0
        rear = 0
        count = 0

```

#### `Dequeue:` (8 行)

> 首行: `if !IsEmpty()`

```python

if !IsEmpty():
        data = list[front]
        list[front] = null
        front = (front + 1) % maxCount
        count = count - 1
        return data

```

#### `Peek:` (4 行)

> 首行: `if !IsEmpty()`

```python

if !IsEmpty():
        return list[front]

```

#### `Enqueue:` (10 行)

> 首行: `if value == null`

```python

if value == null:
        value = _args[0]
        if value != null:
                if IsFull():
                        __Grow()
                        list[rear] = value
                        rear = (rear + 1) % maxCount
                        count = count + 1

```

#### `__Grow:` (16 行)

> 首行: `deltaCount = _args[0]`

```python

deltaCount = _args[0]
newList = CreateList()
if deltaCount == null:
        maxCount = maxCount * 2
        else:
                maxCount = maxCount + deltaCount
                i = front
                j = 0
                while i != rear:
                        newList[j] = list[i]
                        j = j + 1
                        i = (i + 1) % maxCount
                        list = newList
                        front = 0
                        rear = j
```

```python
if _save.level == 0:
        event.trimCount = event.trimCount - 4
        if event.trimCount > 26:
                event.trimCount = 26
                if _save.level == 3:
                        event.trimCount = 30
                        return event

```

```python
camDir = Vector3Rotate(camq,camv)

return camDir
```

#### `InFocus_Head:` (23 行)

> 首行: `camPos = Vector(_state.Camera.x, _state.Camera.y, _state.Camera.z)`

```python
camPos = Vector(_state.Camera.x, _state.Camera.y, _state.Camera.z)
focusPos = Vector(_state.CameraTarget.Face.x, _state.CameraTarget.Face.y, _state.CameraTarget.Face.z)
dirToHead = Normalize(Vector3Sub(focusPos,camPos) )

camq = Quaternion(_state.Camera.rx, _state.Camera.ry,_state.Camera.rz,_state.Camera.rw)
camv = Vector(0, 0, 1)
camDir = Vector3Rotate(camq,camv)

dot = Vector3Dot(dirToHead, camDir)
focus = Abs(dot)











return focus

```

#### `generic_listener:` (32 行)

```python
if duration == null:
        duration = 0
        if maxduration == null:
                maxduration = 0
                if panelmode == null:
                        panelmode = 0
                        if zone.Inside():
                                if panelmode == 2:
                                        missionpanel.SetVisible(true)
                                        if condition.Check():
                                                if panelmode == 1:
                                                        missionpanel.SetVisible(true)

                                                        zone.SetColor(0.5,1,0.5)
                                                        if duration >= maxduration:
                                                                if nextparameters != null:
                                                                        thread.goto(nextcheckpoint, lastzone = zone, parameters=nextparameters)  # state transition
                                                                        else:
                                                                                thread.goto(nextcheckpoint, lastzone = zone)  # state transition
                                                                                else:
                                                                                        if reset:
                                                                                                duration = 0
                                                                                                zone.SetColor(1,1,0.5)
                                                                                                if maxduration>0:
                                                                                                        missionpanel.SetGaugeProgress(duration/maxduration)
                                                                                                        else:
                                                                                                                zone.SetColor(1,0.75,0.5)
                                                                                                                if panelmode >= 1:
                                                                                                                        missionpanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                                                                                        if reset:
                                                                                                                                duration = 0

```

```python
        violated = false
        missionpanel.SetGaugeProgress(0)

                if nextparameters != null:
                        thread.goto(nextcheckpoint, parameters=nextparameters)  # state transition
```

#### `SqrDistance:` (6 行)

> 首行: `dx = _args[0].x - _args[1].x`

```python
dx = _args[0].x - _args[1].x
dy = _args[0].y - _args[1].y
dz = _args[0].z - _args[1].z
return (dx * dx) + (dy * dy) + (dz * dz)


```

#### `Normalize:` (8 行)

> 首行: `v = _args[0]`

```python
v = _args[0]
length = Vector3Length(v)
if length < 0.0001:
        return v
        else:
                return Vector3Scale(v, 1 / length)


```

#### `get_last_seen_direction:` (17 行)

> 首行: `player_pos = _args[0]`

```python

player_pos = _args[0]
player_last_pos = _args[1]
npc_pos = _args[2]

movement = Vector3Sub(player_pos, player_last_pos)

if Vector3Length(movement) < 0.01:

movement = Vector3Sub(player_pos, npc_pos)

movement = Normalize(movement)

return movement

PI = 3.14159

```

#### `atan2:` (20 行)

> 首行: `if y == null`

```python
if y == null:
        y = _args[0]
        x = _args[1]

if x > 0:
        return Atan(y / x)

elif x < 0:
        if y >= 0:
                return Atan(y / x) + PI
                else:
                        return Atan(y / x) - PI
                        else:
                                if y > 0:
                                        return PI / 2
                                        elif y < 0:
                                                return -PI / 2
                                                else:
                                                        return 0

```

#### `yaw_from_quat:` (13 行)

> 首行: `if q == null`

```python
if q == null:
        q = _args[0]

y = q.ry
w = q.rw

sin_term = 2 * (w * y)
cos_term = 1 - 2 * (y * y)

yaw_rad = atan2(sin_term, cos_term)
Log(" yaw_from_quat " +yaw_rad)
return yaw_rad * 180 / PI

```

#### `clamp_angle:` (9 行)

> 首行: `a = _args[0]`

```python
a = _args[0]
while a > 180:
        a = a - 360

while a < (-180):
        a = a + 360

return a

```

#### `slerp_angle:` (11 行)

> 首行: `a0 = _args[0]`

```python
a0 = _args[0]
a1 = _args[1]
t = _args[2]

delta = a1 - a0


delta = clamp_angle(delta)

return a0 + (delta * t)

```

#### `quat_from_yaw:` (6 行)

> 首行: `angle_deg = _args[0]`

```python
angle_deg = _args[0]

half = (angle_deg * PI / 180) * 0.5

return Quaternion(0, Sin(half), 0, Cos(half))

```

#### `slerp_yaw_quat:` (15 行)

> 首行: `if q == null`

```python
if q == null:
        q = _args[0]
        target_angle_deg = _args[1]
        t = _args[2]


a0 = yaw_from_quat(q)


a = slerp_angle(a0, target_angle_deg, t)


return quat_from_yaw(a)


```

#### `yaw_from_direction:` (8 行)

> 首行: `dir = _args[0]`

```python
dir = _args[0]



yaw_rad = atan2(dir.x, dir.z)
return yaw_rad * 180 / PI


```

#### `rotate_to_face:` (16 行)

> 首行: `npc = _args[0]`

```python
npc = _args[0]

npcB_pos = _args[1]
t = _args[2]



dir = Vector3Sub(npcB_pos, npc.GetPosition())


target_yaw = yaw_from_direction(dir)


return rotate_towards(npc=npc, look_target=target_yaw, ignore_last_turn=true)


```

#### `rotate_towards:` (74 行)

> 首行: `current = yaw_from_quat(npc.GetPosition())`

```python


current = yaw_from_quat(npc.GetPosition())
target = look_target

delta = target - current
delta = clamp_angle(delta)

maxTurn = 5


if Abs(delta) <= maxTurn:
        angle = target
        return true
        else:
                angle = current + Sign(delta) * maxTurn
                return false

new_q = quat_from_yaw(angle)

if (!_result) || (ignore_last_turn != true) && (angle < 1):
        npc.Warp(rotation = new_q)




















































```

#### `SetIndulgence:` (15 行)

> 首行: `if arg != null`

```python
if arg != null:
        oldValue = save_value.indulgence
        newValue = oldValue + arg
        if newValue < 0:
                newValue = 0
                elif newValue > 100:
                        newValue = 100
                        save_value.indulgence = newValue

if oldValue < 25 & newValue >= 25:
        SendNotice(text = text_indulgence_threshold_1, duration = 4, mode = notice_mode.panel)
        elif oldValue < 50 & newValue >= 50:
                SendNotice(text = text_indulgence_threshold_2, duration = 4, mode = notice_mode.panel)
                elif oldValue < 75 & newValue >= 75:
                        SendNotice(text = text_indulgence_threshold_3, duration = 4, mode = notice_mode.panel)
```

#### `SetExposure:` (18 行)

> 首行: `if arg != null`

```python
if arg != null:
        oldValue = save_value.exposure
        newValue = oldValue + arg
        if newValue < 0:
                newValue = 0
                if newValue > 100:
                        newValue = 100
                        save_value.exposure = newValue

if oldValue < 90 & newValue >= 90:
        SendNotice(text = text_exposure_threshold_4, duration = 5, mode = notice_mode.panel)
        elif oldValue < 75 & newValue >= 75:
                SendNotice(text = text_exposure_threshold_3, duration = 5, mode = notice_mode.panel)
                elif oldValue < 50 & newValue >= 50:
                        SendNotice(text = text_exposure_threshold_2, duration = 5, mode = notice_mode.panel)
                        elif oldValue < 25 & newValue >= 25:
                                SendNotice(text = text_exposure_threshold_1, duration = 5, mode = notice_mode.panel)

```

```python
                SetStage(daytime = true)
```

```python
if global_message_chat == null:
        global_message_chat = CreateMessengerChat()
        if orientation == null:
                orientation = "Left"
                if user == null:
                        user = text_name_shadow
                        if usercolor == null:
                                usercolor = colors.red
                                if silent == null:
                                        silent = false
                                        if isFromShadow == null:
                                                isFromShadow = true
                                                if notice == null:
                                                        notice = true
                                                        text = text_message_from_shadow + msg
                                                        if msg != null:
                                                                global_message_chat.Add(msg, orientation, user = user, usercolor = usercolor, silent = silent)
                                                                if isFromShadow == true & notice:
                                                                        SendNotice(text = text, duration = 3, mode = notice_mode.panel)

```

```python
if lastPos == null:
        return false
        else:
                deltaX = _state.Position.x - lastPos.x
                deltaZ = _state.Position.z - lastPos.z
                moveDistance = (deltaX * deltaX + deltaZ * deltaZ) ** 0.5
                return moveDistance < 0.05

```

#### `ExposedDistance:` (29 行)

> 首行: `if isInit == null`

```python
if isInit == null:
        isInit = true
        totalDistance = 0
        if checkTimer == null:
                checkTimer = 0
                if maxPendingDistance == null:
                        maxPendingDistance = 5
                        checkTimer = checkTimer + _timediff
                        if checkTimer >= 0.1:
                                checkTimer = 0
                                if condition.Check():
                                        currentPos = _state.Position
                                        delta = Vector3Sub(currentPos, lastPos)
                                        frameDistance = Vector3Length(delta)
                                        pendingDistance = frameDistance
                                        if pendingDistance >= maxPendingDistance:
                                                totalDistance = totalDistance + pendingDistance



checkDistance = totalDistance + pendingDistance
return checkDistance
else:
        totalDistance = 0
        pendingDistance = 0
        lastPos = _state.Position
        return 0


```

#### `listener_exposed_distance:` (44 行)

> 首行: `if isDistanceInit == null`

```python
if isDistanceInit == null:
        isDistanceInit = true
        checkTimer = 0
        totalDistance = 0
        if requiredDistance == null:
                requiredDistance = 30
                if maxPendingDistance == null:
                        maxPendingDistance = 5
                        checkTimer = checkTimer + _timediff
                        if checkTimer >= 0.1:
                                checkTimer = 0
                                if condition.Check():
                                        if _stagechanged:
                                                if _state.Position.stage == "Apart":
                                                        totalDistance = 0
                                                        pendingDistance = 0
                                                        lastPos = _state.Position
                                                        panel.SetGaugeProgress(0)
                                                        else:
                                                                exitcoord = GetTransitionCoords(fromStage = _state.Position.laststage, currentStage = _state.Position.stage)
                                                                delta = Vector3Sub(exitcoord, lastPos)
                                                                pendingDistance = Vector3Length(delta)
                                                                totalDistance = totalDistance + pendingDistance
                                                                lastPos = _state.Position
                                                                pendingDistance = 0
                                                                currentPos = _state.Position
                                                                delta = Vector3Sub(currentPos, lastPos)
                                                                frameDistance = Vector3Length(delta)
                                                                pendingDistance = frameDistance
                                                                if pendingDistance >= maxPendingDistance:
                                                                        totalDistance = totalDistance + pendingDistance
                                                                        pendingDistance = 0
                                                                        lastPos = currentPos
                                                                        panel.SetGaugeProgress(totalDistance / requiredDistance)
                                                                        checkDistance = totalDistance + pendingDistance
                                                                        if checkDistance >= requiredDistance:
                                                                                thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition
                                                                                else:
                                                                                        totalDistance = 0
                                                                                        pendingDistance = 0
```

#### `listener_monitor_detection:` (190 行)

> 首行: `if detectionCondition == null`

```python
if detectionCondition == null:
        lastPos = _state.Position

currentDetectionCount = 0
detectionDuration = 0
maxDetections = 0
isCamouflage = false
enableCamoDuration = 0
currentCamoValue = 0
baseCamoDecay = 2.2
currentCamoDecay = 0
lastCamoDuration = 0
currentCamoCooldown = 0
maxCamoCooldown = 60
bonusDecayRate = 0

baseDetectionTimer = 2.0
currentDetectionTimer = 0

detectionCondition = CreateCondition("[ShowingOff, Watched]")
enableCamoCondition = CreateCondition("(Exposed_Front, Exposed_Hip, Exposed_Upper)")
orgasmCondition = CreateCondition("Orgasm")
eyeMaskCondition = CreateCondition("AdultToy_EyeMask")
handcuffsBackCondition = CreateCondition("HandcuffsBack")
handcuffsObjectCondition = CreateCondition("HandcuffsObject")
masturbationCondition = CreateCondition("(Action_OnaniNormal, Action_MituasiOnani, Action_OnaniNeGanimata, Action_OnaniYotuashi)")
dontEnableCamoCondition = CreateCondition("(Action_UseDildoFloorPussy1, Action_UseDildoFloorAnal1, Action_UseDildoWallPussy1, Action_UseDildoWallAnal1, Action_UseDildoWallFella1)")
dontEnableCamoConditionB = CreateCondition("(Action_KaikyakuFella, Action_OnaniNormal, Action_MituasiOnani, Action_OnaniNeGanimata, Action_OnaniYotuashi, Action_PeeKaikyaku, Action_PeeStand, Action_PeeDog)")

camoDecayLV1Condition = CreateCondition("(Action_ChikubiRotate, Action_OnaniArmKuri, HandcuffsBack, VibrationLow, PistonLow)")
camoDecayLV2Condition = CreateCondition("(VibrationHigh, VibrationRandom, PistonMedium, PistonHigh, PistonRandom, HandcuffsObject, InLight)")
daytimeCondition = CreateCondition("IsDayTime")


detectionPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
detectionPanel.SetText(text_about_to_be_exposed)
detectionPanel.SetVisible(false)
detectionPanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)

enableCamoPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
enableCamoPanel.SetText(text_about_to_be_camo)
enableCamoPanel.SetVisible(false)
enableCamoPanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)

camoValuePanel = CreateMissionPanel()
camoValuePanel.SetText(text_about_to_be_camo_value)
camoValuePanel.SetVisible(false)
camoValuePanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)

cooldownPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
cooldownPanel.SetText(text_about_to_be_camo_cool_down)
cooldownPanel.SetVisible(false)
cooldownPanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)

isEnableCamouflage = save_value.isEnableCamouflage

if _state.Position.stage == "Apart":
        detectionPanel.SetVisible(false)
        enableCamoPanel.SetVisible(false)
        camoValuePanel.SetVisible(false)
        cooldownPanel.SetVisible(false)
        detectionDuration = 0
        currentDetectionCount = 0
        enableCamoDuration = 0
        if currentCamoCooldown > 0:
                currentCamoCooldown = currentCamoCooldown - _timediff
                elif currentCamoCooldown < 0:
                        currentCamoCooldown = 0
                        elif isEnableCamouflage:
                                if currentCamoCooldown > 0:
                                        bonusDecayRate = 0
                                        if eyeMaskCondition.Check() & handcuffsObjectCondition.Check():
                                                bonusDecayRate = 3
                                                elif (eyeMaskCondition.Check() & (masturbationCondition.Check() | dontEnableCamoCondition.Check())) | handcuffsObjectCondition.Check():
                                                        bonusDecayRate = 2
                                                        elif masturbationCondition.Check() | dontEnableCamoCondition.Check() | handcuffsBackCondition.Check() | eyeMaskCondition.Check():
                                                                totalDecayPerSec = 1.0 + bonusDecayRate
                                                                currentCamoCooldown = currentCamoCooldown - (totalDecayPerSec * _timediff)
                                                                if orgasmCondition.Check():
                                                                        if eyeMaskCondition.Check():
                                                                                currentCamoCooldown = currentCamoCooldown - 15
                                                                                else:
                                                                                        currentCamoCooldown = currentCamoCooldown - 10
                                                                                        cooldownPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                                                                        cooldownPanel.SetGaugeProgress(currentCamoCooldown / maxCamoCooldown)
                                                                                        cooldownPanel.SetGaugeVisible(true)
                                                                                        else:
                                                                                                cooldownPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                                                                cooldownPanel.SetGaugeProgress(0)
                                                                                                currentCamoCooldown = 0

if IsPositionNotChanged(lastPos = lastPos) & enableCamoCondition.Check() & !dontEnableCamoCondition.Check() & !dontEnableCamoConditionB.Check() & currentCamoCooldown == 0 & !isCamouflage & !orgasmCondition.Check():
        enableCamoDuration = enableCamoDuration + _timediff

enableCamoPanel.SetVisible(true)
enableCamoPanel.SetGaugeProgress(enableCamoDuration / 5)
enableCamoPanel.SetGaugeVisible(true)
if enableCamoDuration >= 5:
        currentCamoValue = 100
        isCamouflage = true
        enableCamoPanel.SetGaugeProgress(0)
        enableCamoPanel.SetVisible(false)
        else:
                lastPos = _state.Position
                enableCamoDuration = 0
                enableCamoPanel.SetGaugeProgress(0)
                enableCamoPanel.SetVisible(false)

if currentCamoValue > 0:
        currentCamoDecay = baseCamoDecay
        if camoDecayLV1Condition.Check():
                if camoDecayLV2Condition.Check():
                        currentCamoDecay = currentCamoDecay + 2.8
                        else:
                                currentCamoDecay = currentCamoDecay + 1.1
                                elif camoDecayLV2Condition.Check():
                                        currentCamoDecay = currentCamoDecay + 1.8
                                        if !daytimeCondition.Check():
                                                currentCamoDecay = currentCamoDecay - 0.2
                                                currentCamoValue = currentCamoValue - (currentCamoDecay * _timediff)
                                                if orgasmCondition.Check():
                                                        currentCamoValue = currentCamoValue - 10
                                                        SendNotice(text = text_about_to_be_camo_break)

camoValuePanel.SetVisible(true)
camoValuePanel.SetGaugeProgress(currentCamoValue / 100)
camoValuePanel.SetGaugeVisible(true)
if currentCamoValue <= 0:
        currentCamoCooldown = maxCamoCooldown
        isCamouflage = false
        camoValuePanel.SetVisible(false)
        camoValuePanel.SetGaugeProgress(0)
        else:
                currentCamoValue = 0
                camoValuePanel.SetVisible(false)
                camoValuePanel.SetGaugeProgress(0)


if isCamouflage:
        if dontEnableCamoCondition.Check() | dontEnableCamoConditionB.Check():
                isCamouflage = false
                currentCamoCooldown = maxCamoCooldown
                currentCamoValue = 0
                camoValuePanel.SetVisible(false)
                camoValuePanel.SetGaugeProgress(0)

if isCamouflage:
        currentDetectionTimer = baseDetectionTimer

if currentCamoValue >= 90:
        currentDetectionTimer = currentDetectionTimer + 60
        elif currentCamoValue >= 70 & currentCamoValue < 90:
                currentDetectionTimer = currentDetectionTimer + 25
                elif currentCamoValue >= 50 & currentCamoValue < 70:
                        currentDetectionTimer = currentDetectionTimer + 20
                        elif currentCamoValue >= 30 & currentCamoValue < 50:
                                currentDetectionTimer = currentDetectionTimer + 15
                                elif currentCamoValue >= 10 & currentCamoValue < 30:
                                        currentDetectionTimer = currentDetectionTimer + 10
                                        elif currentCamoValue >= 5  & currentCamoValue < 10:
                                                currentDetectionTimer = currentDetectionTimer + 5
                                                elif currentCamoValue > 0  & currentCamoValue < 5:
                                                        currentDetectionTimer = currentDetectionTimer + 2
                                                        else:
                                                                currentDetectionTimer = baseDetectionTimer
                                                                else:
                                                                        currentDetectionTimer = baseDetectionTimer

if detectionCondition.Check():
        detectionPanel.SetVisible(true)
        detectionPanel.SetGaugeVisible(true)
        detectionDuration = detectionDuration + _timediff
        detectionPanel.SetGaugeProgress(detectionDuration / currentDetectionTimer)
        if detectionDuration >= currentDetectionTimer:
                if isCamouflage:
                        SetExposure(arg = 2)
                        else:
                                SetExposure(arg = 1)
                                detectionDuration = 0
                                if maxDetections > 0:
                                        currentDetectionCount = currentDetectionCount + 1
                                        if currentDetectionCount > maxDetections & failedcheckpoint != null:
                                                main.goto(failedcheckpoint)  # state transition
                                                else:
                                                        detectionPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                        detectionPanel.SetGaugeProgress(0)
                                                        detectionDuration = 0



```

#### `listener_meet:` (34 行)

> 首行: `if isInit == null`

```python
if isInit == null:
        isInit = true
        duration = 0
        muzzyDuration = 0
        maxDuration = 5
        exposedCondition = CreateCondition("Exposed_All")
        dogezaCondition = CreateCondition("Action_Dogeza")
        isExposedAll = false
        dogezaArea = CreateArea(type = "cuboid", stage = "Apart", x1 = -1.45, y1 = 0.00, z1 = -0.86, x2 = -1.48, y2 = 0.00, z2 = 0.53, w = 4.5, h = 2.0, outline = false, compass = false)
        dogezaZone = CreateZone(dogezaArea)
        if dogezaZone.Inside():
                if dogezaCondition.Check():
                        if exposedCondition.Check():
                                isExposedAll = true
                                duration = duration + _timediff
                                if duration >= maxDuration:
                                        if nextcheckpoint != null:
                                                thread.goto(nextcheckpoint, isExposedAll = isExposedAll)  # state transition
                                                else:
                                                        isExposedAll = false
                                                        if failedcheckpoint != null:
                                                                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, isExposedAll = isExposedAll)  # state transition
                                                                else:
                                                                        if duration != 0:
                                                                                if failedcheckpoint != null:
                                                                                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, isExposedAll = isExposedAll)  # state transition
                                                                                        else:
                                                                                                muzzyDuration = muzzyDuration + _timediff
                                                                                                if muzzyDuration >= 60:
                                                                                                        if failedcheckpoint != null:
                                                                                                                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, isExposedAll = isExposedAll)  # state transition
                                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                                        duration = 0

```

#### `listener_check_meet:` (17 行)

> 首行: `if isInit == null`

```python
if isInit == null:
        isInit = true
        isFirstPunished = false
        duration = 0
        meetCondition = CreateCondition("[Exposed_All, Action_Dogeza]")
        if !meetCondition.Check():
                if !isFirstPunished:
                        SetExposure(arg = 5)
                        enableTimer = true
                        isFirstPunished = true
                        SendNotice(text = text_listener_check_meet_notice, duration = 5)
                        else:
                                duration = duration + _timediff
                                if duration >= 5:
                                        SetExposure(arg = 5)
                                        duration = 0

```

```python
if isInit == null:
        isInit = true
        condition = CreateCondition("IsDayTime")
        if !condition.Check():
                isNight = true
                if nextcheckpoint != null:
                        thread.goto(nextcheckpoint, isNight = isNight)  # state transition

```

```python
if isInit == null:
        isInit = true
        panel = CreateMissionPanel()
        panel.SetVisible(false)
        panel.SetGaugeVisible(false)
        exposedCondition = CreateCondition("(Exposed_Front, Exposed_Hip, Exposed_Upper)")
        if _state.Position.stage != "Apart":
                if !exposedCondition.Check():
                        panel.SetVisible(true)
                        panel.SetText(text_listener_exposed_check)
                        SetExposure(0.5*_timediff)
                        else:
                                panel.SetVisible(false)
                                else:
                                        panel.SetVisible(false)
```

```python
timer = 0
interval = 0.35

nameFlags = CreateList()
nameBoards = CreateList()
nameBoards0 = CreateList()


descriptionBoards = CreateList()

timerFlags = CreateList()
timerBoards = CreateList()
timerBoards0 = CreateList()
timerColor1 = Color(0.988235, 0.056078, 0.095294)
timerColor0 = Color(0.421569, 0.971176, 0.390588)

welcomePromptBoard = null
welcomeColor = Color(0.910000, 0.200000, 0.850000)

startPromptBoard = null
startPromptColor = Color(0.35, 0.35, 0.90)

annoyPromptBoard = null
annoyPromptColor = Color(1.000000, 0, 0)

```

#### `setFlushInterval:` (5 行)

> 首行: `newFlushInterval = _args[0]`

```python
newFlushInterval = _args[0]
if newFlushInterval != null && (newFlushInterval >= 0):
        flushInterval = newFlushIntervalflushInterval

```

#### `trigger:` (7 行)

> 首行: `index = _args[0]`

```python

event = _args[1]
__triggerName(index, event)
```

#### `flush:` (26 行)

> 首行: `if timer > interval`

```python

if timer > interval:
        index = _args[0]
        remainTime = _args[1]
        string = ": " + remainTime
        string = __decorate(index, string)
        if timerBoards[index] == null:
                timerBoards[index] = __createTimerBoard()
                if timerBoards0[index] == null:
                        timerBoards0[index] = __createTimerBoard()
                        color = timerColor0
                        if remainTime <= 10:
                                color = timerColor1

d = (-1)

timerFlags[index] = !timerFlags[index]
if timerFlags[index]:
        timerBoards0[index].Clear()
        timerBoards[index].Add(text = string, duration = d, facecolor = color)
        else:
                timerBoards[index].Clear()
                timerBoards0[index].Add(text = string, duration = d, facecolor = color)
                timer = 0
                timer = timer + _timediff

```


#### `clearEvents:` (20 行)

> 首行: `count = nameBoards.Count()`

```python
count = nameBoards.Count()
i = 0
while i < count:
        descriptionBoard = descriptionBoards[i]
        if descriptionBoard != null:
                descriptionBoard.Clear()
                nameBoard = nameBoards[i]
                if nameBoard != null:
                        nameBoard.Clear()
                        nameBoard0 = nameBoards0[i]
                        if nameBoard0 != null:
                                nameBoard0.Clear()
                                timerBoard = timerBoards[i]
                                if timerBoard != null:
                                        timerBoard.Clear()
                                        timerBoard0 = timerBoards0[i]
                                        if timerBoard0 != null:
                                                timerBoard0.Clear()
                                                i += 1

```

#### `clearDiscriptions:` (8 行)

> 首行: `count = descriptionBoards.Count()`

```python
count = descriptionBoards.Count()
i = 0
while i < count:
        descriptionBoard = descriptionBoards[i]
        if descriptionBoard != null:
                descriptionBoard.Clear()
                i += 1

```

#### `__decorate:` (10 行)

> 首行: `index = _args[0]`

```python


index = _args[0]
string = _args[1]
i = 0
while i < index:
        string = "\n" + string
        i = i + 1
        return string

```

#### `__triggerDiscription:` (10 行)

> 首行: `index = _args[0]`

```python

index = _args[0]
event = _args[1]
descriptionBoard = descriptionBoards[index]
if descriptionBoard == null:
        descriptionBoard = __createDiscriptionBoard()
        descriptionBoards[index] = descriptionBoard
        string = __decorate(index, event.common.description)
        descriptionBoards[index].Add(text = string, duration = event.common.delay, facecolor = event.common.descriptionFaceColor)

```

#### `__triggerName:` (17 行)

> 首行: `index = _args[0]`

```python

index = _args[0]
event = _args[1]
string = __decorate(index, event.common.name)

if nameBoards[index] == null:
        nameBoards[index] = __createNameBoard()
        if nameBoards0[index] == null:
                nameBoards0[index] = __createNameBoard()
                nameFlags[index] = !nameFlags[index]
                if nameFlags[index]:
                        nameBoards0[index].Clear()
                        nameBoards[index].Add(text = string, duration = (-1), facecolor = event.common.nameFaceColor)
                        else:
                                nameBoards[index].Clear()
                                nameBoards0[index].Add(text = string, duration = (-1), facecolor = event.common.nameFaceColor)

```

```python
nameBoard.SetSize(30)
return nameBoard

```
