## `consumer_.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\Lilith's Fun\consumer_.code`

### 标签

#### `consumer_:` (24 行)

> 首行: `workingProcessors = CreateThread("RecordSet")`

```python

workingProcessors = create_thread("RecordSet")
whiteProcessors = create_thread("RecordSet")

eventQueue = null

eventTable = CreateList()
eventTimers = CreateList()
startFlags = CreateList()
textTrigger = create_thread("consumerTextTrigger_")
processors = CreateList()
maxDisplayCount = 3
skipCondition = create_thread("defautConditon_")
annoyedCondition = create_thread("defautConditon_")

blockFlag = true

missioning = false
welcomePrompt = false
startPrompt = false
annoyPrompt = false

shouldAnnoyed = false

```

#### `startLoop:` (3 行)

> 首行: `_result = CreateListenerLocal("__consume")`

```python

_result = create_listener("__consume")

```

#### `__consume:` (15 行)

> 首行: `i = 0`

```python
i = 0
shouldAnnoyed = annoyedCondition.check()
if (!skipCondition.check()) && (!shouldAnnoyed) && (!blockFlag):
        __clearPrompts()
        while i < maxDisplayCount:
                __tryFlushEvent(i)
                __tryProcess(i)
                __tryFlushUI(i)
                i = i + 1
                else:
                        __prompt()
                        while i < maxDisplayCount:
                                __tryFlushUI(i)
                                i = i + 1

```

#### `__tryFlushUI:` (9 行)

> 首行: `index = _args[0]`

```python

index = _args[0]
timer = eventTimers[index]
event = eventTable[index]
if event != null && (timer != null):
        remainTime = event.common.delay + event.common.duration - timer
        remainTime = Trunc(remainTime)
        textTrigger.flush(index, remainTime)

```

#### `__tryFlushEvent:` (26 行)

> 首行: `index = _args[0]`

```python

index = _args[0]
event = eventTable[index]
timer = eventTimers[index]
if event == null || (timer >= (event.common.duration + event.common.delay)):
        if event != null:
                processor = processors[event.common.requiredProcessor]
                if processor != null:
                        processor.end()
                        workingProcessors.Remove(event.common.requiredProcessor)
                        newEvent = eventQueue.Dequeue()
                        if newEvent != null && ((!workingProcessors.Contains(newEvent.common.requiredProcessor)) || (whiteProcessors.Contains(newEvent.common.requiredProcessor))):

eventTable[index] = newEvent
eventTimers[index] = 0
textTrigger.trigger(index, newEvent)
PlaySoundEffect("Pinpon", volume = 1)
processor = processors[newEvent.common.requiredProcessor]
if processor != null:

startFlags[index] = false
workingProcessors.Insert(newEvent.common.requiredProcessor)
else:
        eventTable[index] = null
        eventTimers[index] = null

```

#### `__tryProcess:` (14 行)

> 首行: `index = _args[0]`

```python

index = _args[0]
event = eventTable[index]
timer = eventTimers[index]
if event != null && timer != null:
        if timer > event.common.delay:
                processor = processors[event.common.requiredProcessor]
                if processor != null:
                        if !startFlags[index]:
                                startFlags[index] = true
                                processor.start(event)
                                processor.update(event)
                                eventTimers[index] = timer + _timediff

```

#### `__clearPrompts:` (11 行)

> 首行: `if !missioning`

```python
if !missioning:
        missioning = true

startPrompt = false
welcomePrompt = false
annoyPrompt = false

textTrigger.clearStartPrompt()
textTrigger.clearWelcomePrompt()
textTrigger.clearAnnoyPrompt()

```

#### `__prompt:` (28 行)

> 首行: `missioning = false`

```python
missioning = false
if _state.Position.stage == "Apart":
        startPrompt = false
        annoyPrompt = false
        if !welcomePrompt:
                welcomePrompt = true
                textTrigger.clearStartPrompt()
                textTrigger.clearAnnoyPrompt()
                textTrigger.promptWelcome()
                else:
                        welcomePrompt = false
                        if shouldAnnoyed:
                                startPrompt = false
                                if !annoyPrompt:
                                        annoyPrompt = true
                                        textTrigger.clearDiscriptions()
                                        textTrigger.clearStartPrompt()
                                        textTrigger.clearWelcomePrompt()
                                        textTrigger.promptAnnoy()
                                        else:
                                                annoyPrompt = false
                                                if !startPrompt:
                                                        startPrompt = true
                                                        textTrigger.clearDiscriptions()
                                                        textTrigger.clearWelcomePrompt()
                                                        textTrigger.clearAnnoyPrompt()
                                                        textTrigger.promptStart()

```

#### `addWhiteKey:` (2 行)

> 首行: `whiteProcessors.Insert(key)`

```python

whiteProcessors.Insert(key)
```

#### `removeWhiteKey:` (2 行)

> 首行: `whiteProcessors.Remove(key)`

```python

whiteProcessors.Remove(key)
```

> 首行: `processors[_args[0]] = null`

```python

processors[_args[0]] = null
```

#### `addProcessor:` (2 行)

> 首行: `processors[_args[0]] = _args[1]`

```python

processors[_args[0]] = _args[1]
```

```python
        eventQueue = newEventQueue
```

```python
maxDisplayCount = _args[0]
```


```python
        skipCondition = newSkipCondition
```

#### `setAnnoyedCondition:` (5 行)

> 首行: `isBlocked = _args[0]`


#### `ender:` (0 行)

```python
```

#### `do:` (6 行)

> 首行: `if value != null`

```python
if value != null:
        processor = processors[value.common.requiredProcessor]
        if processor != null:
                processor.end()
                workingProcessors.Remove(value.requiredProcessor)
                er = create_thread("ender")
```

#### `stop:` (4 行)

> 首行: `Foreach(eventTable, er)`

```python
Foreach(eventTable, er)
eventTable.Remove(index = 0, count = maxDisplayCount)
textTrigger.clearEvents()
blockFlag = true
```

## `createrForcedPistonOn_.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\Lilith's Fun\createrForcedPistonOn_.code`

### 标签

#### `createrForcedPistonOn_:` (7 行)

> 首行: `pistonTypes = CreateList("PistonAnal", "PistonPussy")`

```python





pistonTypes = CreateList("PistonAnal", "PistonPussy")

```

#### `create:` (32 行)

> 首行: `event = CreateList()`

```python


event = CreateList()
event.common = CreateList()
event.common.requiredProcessor = "processorForcedPistonOn"
event.common.name = StringsPool2.ForcedPistonOnString
event.common.description = RandomString("ForcedPistonOn", StringsPool0)
event.common.duration = 60
event.pistonTypes = CreateList()

i = 0
while i < 2:
        r = RandomInt(0, 2)
        if r == 1:
                event.pistonTypes.Insert(pistonTypes[i])
                i = i + 1
                if event.pistonTypes.Count() == 0:
                        event.pistonTypes.Insert(pistonTypes[0])

r = RandomInt(1, 5)
if r == 3:
        r = RandomInt(1, 5)
        if r == 4:
                r = 3
                event.common.duration = 40
```

## `createrForcedVibratorOn_.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\Lilith's Fun\createrForcedVibratorOn_.code`

### 标签

#### `createrForcedVibratorOn_:` (7 行)

> 首行: `vibratorTypes = CreateList("TitRotor", "Vibrator", "KuriRotor")`

```python





vibratorTypes = CreateList("TitRotor", "Vibrator", "KuriRotor")

```

#### `create:` (32 行)

> 首行: `event = CreateList()`

```python


event = CreateList()
event.common = CreateList()
event.common.requiredProcessor = "processorForcedVibratorOn"
event.common.name = StringsPool2.ForcedVibratorOnString
event.common.description = RandomString("ForcedVibratorOn", StringsPool0)
event.common.duration = 50
event.vibratorTypes = CreateList()

i = 0
while i < 3:
        r = RandomInt(0, 2)
        if r == 1:
                event.vibratorTypes.Insert(vibratorTypes[i])
                i = i + 1
                if event.vibratorTypes.Count() == 0:
                        event.vibratorTypes.Insert(vibratorTypes[1])

r = RandomInt(1, 4)
if r == 2:
        r = RandomInt(1, 4)
        if r == 2:
                r = 3
                event.common.duration = 12
                elif r == 3:
                        r = 2
                        event.common.duration = 25
                        event.strength = r
                        return event


```

## `end.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\失控的代价\end.code`

### 顶层代码 (on load)

```python

```

### 标签

#### `InitEndingNoticeSystem:` (14 行)

> 首行: `tempPanel = CreateMissionPanel()`

```python
tempPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
tempPanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)
tempPanel.SetVisible(false)
Global("ending_notice_panel", tempPanel)
tempText = CreateText()
tempText.SetSize(50)
tempText.SetAnchor(0.5, 0.7)
Global("ending_notice_subtitle", tempText)
Global("ending_notice_data", null)
Global("ending_notice_active", false)
Global("ending_notice_timer", 0)
Global("ending_notice_duration", 3)
Global("listener_ending_notice", CreateListener("listener_ending_notice"))

```

#### `listener_global_end_check:` (6 行)

> 首行: `if !save_value.isEndingCheck`

```python
if !save_value.isEndingCheck:
        if save_value.exposure >= 100:
                ClearSubtitle()
                save_value.isEndingCheck = true
                main.goto('ending_exposura_failed_await')  # state transition

```

#### `SendEndingNotice:` (14 行)

> 首行: `if duration == null`

```python
if duration == null:
        duration = 3
        if mode == null:
                mode = notice_mode.panel
                if color == null:
                        color = colors.white
                        noticeData = CreateList()
                        noticeData.text = text
                        noticeData.duration = duration
                        noticeData.mode = mode
                        noticeData.color = color
                        ending_notice_data = noticeData


```

#### `listener_ending_notice:` (23 行)

> 首行: `if ending_notice_data != null & !ending_notice_active`

```python
if ending_notice_data != null & !ending_notice_active:
        currentText = ending_notice_data.text
        currentMode = ending_notice_data.mode
        currentColor = ending_notice_data.color
        ending_notice_duration = ending_notice_data.duration

if currentMode == notice_mode.panel | currentMode == notice_mode.both:
        ending_notice_panel.SetText(currentText)
        ending_notice_panel.SetVisible(true)
        if currentMode == notice_mode.subtitle | currentMode == notice_mode.both:
                ending_notice_subtitle.Add(text = currentText, duration = ending_notice_duration, facecolor = currentColor)
                ending_notice_timer = 0
                ending_notice_active = true
                ending_notice_data = null
                if ending_notice_active:
                        ending_notice_timer = ending_notice_timer + _timediff
                        if ending_notice_timer >= ending_notice_duration:
                                ending_notice_panel.SetVisible(false)
                                ending_notice_active = false
                                ending_notice_timer = 0



```

---

## `eventDecorator_.code`

```python


name = "[Unamed]"
description = "[empty]"
duration = 5
delay = 5
requirdProcesser = "processerRest"
nameFaceColor = Color(0.988235, 0.200588, 0.554314)
descriptionFaceColor = Color(1.000000, 0.102157, 0.688824)
```

#### `decorate:` (22 行)

> 首行: `event = _args[0]`

```python


event = _args[0]
if event == null:
        event = CreateLsit()
        if event.common == null:
                event.common = CreateLsit()
                if event.common.name == null || (event.common.name == ""):
                        event.common.name = name
                        if event.common.description == null || (event.common.description == ""):
                                event.common.description = description
                                if event.common.duration == null:
                                        event.common.duration = duration
                                        if event.common.delay == null:
                                                event.common.delay = delay
                                                if event.common.requiredProcesser == null || (event.common.requiredProcesser == ""):
                                                        event.common.requiredProcesser = requiredProcesser
                                                        if event.common.nameFaceColor == null:
                                                                event.common.nameFaceColor = nameFaceColor
                                                                if event.common.descriptionFaceColor == null:
                                                                        event.common.descriptionFaceColor = descriptionFaceColor
                                                                        return event
```

## `generater_.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\Lilith's Fun\generater_.code`

### 标签

#### `generater_:` (15 行)

> 首行: `eventQueue = null`

```python
eventQueue = null

creaters = create_thread("DynamicDict")
keysMemory = create_thread("Queue")
memory = create_thread("Queue")
memoryThreshold = 4
eventsThreshold = 15

whiteList = create_thread("RecordSet")

eventDecorator = create_thread("eventDecorator_")

adjustorDefault = create_thread("adjustorDefault_")
adjustors = create_thread("DynamicDict")

```

#### `startLoop:` (3 行)

> 首行: `_result = CreateListenerLocal("__generate")`

```python

_result = create_listener("__generate")

```

#### `__generate:` (5 行)

> 首行: `if eventQueue.GetCount() < eventsThreshold`

```python
if eventQueue.GetCount() < eventsThreshold:
        __delMemory()
        event = __roll()
        eventQueue.Enqueue(event)

```

#### `__delMemory:` (5 行)

> 首行: `if memory.GetCount() > memoryThreshold`

```python
if memory.GetCount() > memoryThreshold:
        item = memory.Dequeue()
        key = keysMemory.Dequeue()
        creaters.Insert(key, item)

```

#### `calcWeights:` (1 行)

> 首行: `totalWeight = 0`

```python
totalWeight = 0
```

#### `do:` (1 行)

> 首行: `totalWeight = totalWeight + value.weight`

```python
totalWeight = totalWeight + value.weight
```

#### `GetTotalWeight:` (1 行)

> 首行: `_result = totalWeight`

```python
return totalWeight
```

#### `reset:` (3 行)

> 首行: `totalWeight = 0`

```python
totalWeight = 0
cw = create_thread("calcWeights")

```

#### `roller:` (2 行)

> 首行: `r = 0`

```python
r = 0
progress = 0
```

#### `do:` (3 行)

> 首行: `progress = progress + value.weight`

```python
progress = progress + value.weight
if progress >= r:
        return false
```

#### `reset:` (8 行)

> 首行: `progress = 0`

```python

progress = 0
total = _args[0]
if total < 0:
        total = 0
        r = Random(0, total)
        rr = create_thread("roller")

```

#### `__roll:` (24 行)

> 首行: `keys = creaters.GetKeys()`

```python

keys = creaters.GetKeys()
items = Copy(creaters.GetValues(), true)
cw.reset()
Foreach(items, cw)
totalWeight = cw.GetTotalWeight()
rr.reset(totalWeight)
i = Foreach(items, rr)
key = keys[i]

item = items[i]

creater = item.creater
event = eventDecorator.decorate(creater.create())
event = adjustorDefault.adjust(event)
adjustor = adjustors.At(key)
if adjustor != null:
        event = adjustor.adjust(event)
        if !whiteList.Contains(key):
                memory.Enqueue(item)
                keysMemory.Enqueue(key)
                creaters.Remove(key)
                return event

```

#### `setEventQueue:` (2 行)

> 首行: `eventQueue = _args[0]`

```python

eventQueue = _args[0]
```

#### `addWhiteKey:` (2 行)

> 首行: `whiteList.Insert(_args[0])`

```python

whiteList.Insert(_args[0])
```

#### `removeWhiteKey:` (2 行)

> 首行: `whiteList.Remove(_args[0])`

```python

whiteList.Remove(_args[0])
```

#### `clearWhiteList:` (1 行)

> 首行: `whiteList.Clear()`

```python
whiteList.Clear()
```

#### `setMemoryThreshold:` (5 行)

> 首行: `newMemoryThreshold = _args[0]`

```python


newMemoryThreshold = _args[0]
if newMemoryThreshold != null && (newMemoryThreshold < eventsThreshold):
        memoryThreshold = newMemoryThreshold
```

#### `getMemoryThreshold:` (2 行)

> 首行: `_result = memoryThreshold`

```python

return memoryThreshold
```

#### `setEventsThreshold:` (5 行)

> 首行: `newEventsThreshold = _args[0]`

```python


newEventsThreshold = _args[0]
if newEventsThreshold != null && (memoryThreshold < newEventsThreshold):
        eventsThreshold = newEventsThreshold
```

#### `getEventsThreshold:` (3 行)

> 首行: `_result = eventsThreshold`

```python

return eventsThreshold

```

#### `addCreater:` (10 行)

> 首行: `key = _args[0]`

```python

key = _args[0]
creater = _args[1]
weight = _args[2]
if creater != null && (key != null):
        if weight == null:
                weight = 1
                item = CreateList(creater = creater,weight = weight)
                creaters.Insert(key, item)

```

#### `removeCreater:` (5 行)

> 首行: `key = _args[0]`

```python

key = _args[0]
if key != null:
        creaters.Remove(key)

```

#### `addAdjustor:` (5 行)

> 首行: `createrKey = _args[0]`

```python

createrKey = _args[0]
adjustor = _args[1]
if createrKey != null && (adjustor != null):
        adjustors.Insert(createrKey, adjustor)
```

#### `removeAdjustor:` (5 行)

> 首行: `createrKey = _args[0]`

```python

createrKey = _args[0]
if createrKey != null:
        adjustors.Remove(createrKey)

```

## `listener_chapter_1.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\失控的代价\listener_chapter_1.code`

### 标签

#### `listener_chapter_1_start:` (48 行)

> 首行: `if isInit == null`

```python
if isInit == null:
        isInit = true
        missionStage = 0
        duration = 0
        missionPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
        missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
        missionPanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)
        dogezaCondition = CreateCondition("Action_Dogeza")
        infoLog = "listener_chapter_1_start:"
        infoIndex = 0
        if missionStage == 0:
                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                        subDur = 0
                        maxSubDur = 0
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_start_a, duration = 3)
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_start_b, duration = 3) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_start_c, duration = 3, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                missionPanel.SetText(text_chapter_1_cp1_notice_get_down)
                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                elif missionStage == 1:
                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                duration = duration + _timediff
                                                if duration >= 5:
                                                        if failedcheckpoint != null:
                                                                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint)  # state transition
                                                                if dogezaCondition.Check():
                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                        elif missionStage == 2:
                                                                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                        missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                                                        subDur = 0
                                                                                        maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_successed_a, duration = 3)
                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_successed_b, duration = 3) + maxSubDur
                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_successed_c, duration = 4, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                                                                                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                                thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition

```

#### `listener_chapter_1_cp1_edge_punish:` (148 行)

> 首行: `if isInit == null`

```python
if isInit == null:
        isInit = true
        isFailed = false
        missionStage = 0
        missionPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
        missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
        missionPanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)

missionCondition = CreateCondition("[AdultToy_TitRotor, AdultToy_KuriRotor, (Exposed_Front, Exposed_Hip)]")
vibrationOffCondition = CreateCondition("VibrationOff")
vibrationNotRandomCondition = CreateCondition("(VibrationLow, VibrationHigh)")
exposedCondition = CreateCondition("(Exposed_Front, Exposed_Hip, Exposed_Upper)")
currentEcstasy = 0
text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edging_notice
ecstasyPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
enableThreshold = 0.6
currentThreshold = 0.0
isEdging = false
isInRandomWait = false
isGoOut = false
isSuccessed = false
isWaitRandom = false
duration = 0
maxDuration = 3
edgingEcstasy = 0
infoLog = "listener_chapter_1_cp1_edge_punish:"
infoIndex = 0

if isGoOut & !exposedCondition.Check():
        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "expose")  # state transition
        if !isGoOut & _state.Position.stage != "Apart" & missionStage < 2:
                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "runaway")  # state transition

if missionStage == 0:
        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                subDur = 0
                maxSubDur = 0
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_failed_a)
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_failed_b) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_failed_c) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_failed_d) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_failed_e)  + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_failed_f, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_failed_g) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_failed_h, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_failed_i, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_failed_j) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_failed_k, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_get_down_failed_l, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                subDur = subDur + _timediff
                if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                        elif missionStage == 1:
                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                        missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                        missionPanel.SetText(text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_start_notice)
                                        subDur = 0
                                        maxSubDur = 0
                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_start_a, duration = 4, color = colors.red)
                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_start_b, duration = 4, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_start_c, duration = 4, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                elif missionStage == 2:
                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                if _state.Position.stage != "Apart":
                                                                        isGoOut = true
                                                                        if missionCondition.Check():
                                                                                currentEcstasy = _state.Ecstasy
                                                                                ecstasyPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                                                                ecstasyPanel.SetGaugeProgress(currentEcstasy, 1)
                                                                                ecstasyPanel.SetText(Format(text, currentEcstasy))
                                                                                ecstasyPanel.SetGaugeVisible(true)
                                                                                if currentEcstasy >= 1 | (currentEcstasy == 0 & !isEdging):
                                                                                        if !isWaitRandom:
                                                                                                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "none")  # state transition
                                                                                                if vibrationOffCondition.Check():

if currentEcstasy >= 0.9 & !isEdging:

isEdging = true
isWaitRandom = false
elif !isEdging:

thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "none")  # state transition
elif vibrationNotRandomCondition.Check():
        if !isWaitRandom:
                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "none")  # state transition
                if isEdging:

if isInRandomWait == false:
        currentThreshold = Random(0.2, enableThreshold)
        isInRandomWait = true
        elif currentEcstasy <= currentThreshold:
                SetVibrator(3)
                isInRandomWait = false
                isEdging = false
                isWaitRandom = true
                if _state.Position.stage == "Convenience":

if _state.Action == "Dogeza" & !isSuccessed:
        duration = duration + _timediff
        if duration >= maxDuration:
                isSuccessed = true
                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_cp1_edging_msg)
                else:
                        duration = 0
                        else:
                                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "none")  # state transition
                                elif isGoOut:
                                        if isSuccessed:
                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                else:
                                                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "none")  # state transition
                                                        elif missionStage == 3:
                                                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                        MissionSucceed()
                                                                        subDur = 0
                                                                        maxSubDur = 0
                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_successed_a)
                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_successed_b) + maxSubDur
                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_successed_c) + maxSubDur
                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_gohome_now) + maxSubDur
                                                                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                duration = 0
                                                                                elif missionStage == 4:
                                                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                                                                                missionPanel.SetText(text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_punish_gohome_panel)
                                                                                                duration = duration + _timediff
                                                                                                if duration >= 600:
                                                                                                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "timeout")  # state transition
                                                                                                        if _state.Position.stage == "Apart":
                                                                                                                thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition

```

#### `listener_chapter_1_cp1_meet:` (90 行)

> 首行: `if isInit == null`

```python
if isInit == null:
        isInit = true
        missionPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
        missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
        missionPanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)
        exposedCondition = CreateCondition("Exposed_All")
        dogezaCondition = CreateCondition("Action_Dogeza")
        isMeet = false
        dogezaArea = CreateAreaEx(coordList = coord_apart_meet_sphere)
        dogezaZone = CreateZone(dogezaArea)
        duration = 0
        maxDuration = 5
        muzzyDuration = 0
        missionStage = 0
        meetDuration = 0
        infoLog = "listener_chapter_1_cp1_meet:"
        infoIndex = 0

if isMeet:
        if !dogezaZone.Inside() | !exposedCondition.Check() | !dogezaCondition.Check():
                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "rule")  # state transition
                if missionStage == 0:
                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                subDur = 0
                                maxSubDur = 0
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_a)
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_b) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_c, duration = 3) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_d) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_e) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_f) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_g) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_h) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_i) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_j) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_k) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_l) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_m) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_n) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_o) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_p, duration = 3) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_q) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_r) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_s, duration = 5, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_t) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_u, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                                subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                        elif missionStage == 1:
                                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                        missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                                        missionPanel.SetText(text_chapter_1_cp1_dogeza_notice)
                                                        duration = 0
                                                        meetDuration = 0
                                                        if dogezaZone.Inside() & dogezaCondition.Check() & exposedCondition.Check():
                                                                meetDuration = meetDuration + _timediff
                                                                if meetDuration >= 5:
                                                                        missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                        else:
                                                                                meetDuration = 0
                                                                                duration = duration + _timediff
                                                                                if duration >= 60:
                                                                                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "muzzy")  # state transition
                                                                                        elif missionStage == 2:
                                                                                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                        isMeet = true
                                                                                                        missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                                                                                        missionPanel.SetText(text_chapter_1_cp1_mission_notice)
                                                                                                        subDur = 0
                                                                                                        maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_task_a)
                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_task_b) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_task_c) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_task_d) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_task_e) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_task_f) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_task_g) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_meet_task_h) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                                                thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition
```

```python
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if duration >= 15:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "eyemaskTimeOut")  # state transition
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if eyeMaskCondition.Check():
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_mall_f, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetText(text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_panel_o)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif missionStage == 27:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_seleka_t)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_seleka_u, duration = 3) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if _state.Position.stage != "ShoppingMall" & _state.Position.stage != "FashionShop":
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "bustle")  # state transition
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if !eyeMaskCondition.Check():
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "eyemask")  # state transition
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if subDur >= maxSubDur & _state.Position.stage == "FashionShop":
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_mall_g, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_mall_h, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionPanel.SetText(text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_panel_p)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        boxA = CreateInteractAreaEx(coordList = coord_chapter_1_box_a, text = text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_interact_d)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        boxB = CreateInteractAreaEx(coordList = coord_chapter_1_box_b, text = text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_interact_e)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        boxC = CreateInteractAreaEx(coordList = coord_chapter_1_box_c, text = text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_interact_f)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        boxReal = CreateInteractAreaEx(coordList = coord_chapter_1_box_real, text = text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_interact_g)
```
