```python
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_earphone_c, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_earphone_d, duration = 3) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_earphone_e, duration = 3, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_find_earphone_earphone_f, duration = 3, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition

```

#### `listener_chapter_1_punish_photo:` (196 行)

> 首行: `if isInit == null`

```python
if isInit == null:
        isInit = true
        missionStage = 0
        duration = 0
        isReady = false
        exposedCondition = CreateCondition("(Exposed_Front, Exposed_Hip, Exposed_Upper)")
        missionCondition = CreateCondition("[AdultToy_EyeMask, AdultToy_TitRotor, AdultToy_KuriRotor, VibrationRandom]")
        dayCondition = CreateCondition("IsDayTime")
        missionPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
        missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
        missionPanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)
        infoLog = "listener_chapter_1_punish_photo:"
        infoIndex = 0
        if !dayCondition.Check():
                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "night")  # state transition
                if !exposedCondition.Check():
                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "rule")  # state transition
                        if isReady & !missionCondition.Check():
                                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "conditionBroke")  # state transition
                                if missionStage == 0:
                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                                missionPanel.SetText(text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_panel_a)
                                                duration = 0
                                                subDur = 0
                                                maxSubDur = 0
                                                missionArea = null
                                                if missionCondition.Check():
                                                        isReady = true
                                                        if save_value.isGetEarphone:
                                                                if missionArea == null:
                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_shadow_a, color = colors.red)
                                                                        missionArea = CreateInteractAreaEx(coordList = coord_chapter_1_hella_optics, text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_interact_a)
                                                                        missionPanel.SetText(text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_panel_b)
                                                                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                else:
                                                                                        if missionArea == null:
                                                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_msg_a)
                                                                                                missionArea = CreateInteractAreaEx(coordList = coord_chapter_1_hella_optics, text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_interact_b)
                                                                                                missionPanel.SetText(text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_panel_c)
                                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                        duration = duration + _timediff
                                                                                                        if duration >= 60:
                                                                                                                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "notReady")  # state transition
                                                                                                                elif missionStage == 1:
                                                                                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                duration = 0
                                                                                                                                if missionArea.Check():
                                                                                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                        else:
                                                                                                                                                duration = duration + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                if duration >= 1200:
                                                                                                                                                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "areaTimeOut")  # state transition
                                                                                                                                                        elif missionStage == 2:
                                                                                                                                                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                        missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                                                                                                                                        duration = 0
                                                                                                                                                                        subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                        if save_value.isGetEarphone:
                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_a)
                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_b) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_msg_b)
                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_c)
                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_a) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_b) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                        save_value.isGetEarphone = true
                                                                                                                                                                                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                                                                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                elif missionStage == 3:
                                                                                                                                                                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                duration = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_shadow_b)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_d) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_e) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                                                if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionPanel.SetText(text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_panel_d)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                        photoSecondZone = CreateInteractAreaEx(coordList = coord_chapter_1_punish_photo_b, text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_interact_c)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        photoThirdZone = CreateInteractAreaEx(coordList = coord_chapter_1_punish_photo_c, text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_interact_c)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        isFirstZoneFinished = false
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        isSecondZoneFinished = false
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        isThirdZoneFinished = false
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        photoCount = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif missionStage == 4:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        duration = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        duration = duration + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if photoFirstZone.Check() & !isFirstZoneFinished:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                isFirstZoneFinished = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                photoCount = photoCount + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SetExposure(arg = 2)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if photoCount == 1:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_f)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif photoCount == 2:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_g)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif photoCount == 3:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_h)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if photoSecondZone.Check() & !isSecondZoneFinished:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                isSecondZoneFinished = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                photoCount = photoCount + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SetExposure(arg = 2)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if photoCount == 1:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_f)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif photoCount == 2:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_g)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif photoCount == 3:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_h)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if photoThirdZone.Check() & !isThirdZoneFinished:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                isThirdZoneFinished = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                photoCount = photoCount + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SetExposure(arg = 2)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if photoCount == 1:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_f)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif photoCount == 2:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_g)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif photoCount == 3:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_h)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if isFirstZoneFinished & isSecondZoneFinished & isThirdZoneFinished:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if subDur == 0:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_i) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_j) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if duration >= 600 & photoCount != 3:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "photo")  # state transition
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif missionStage == 5:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        duration = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_shadow_c)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_shadow_d) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_shadow_e) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_k) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                photoFourthZone = CreateInteractAreaEx(coordList = coord_chapter_1_punish_photo_d, text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_interact_c)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                isFourthZoneFinished = false
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetText(text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_panel_e)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif missionStage == 6:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                duration = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                duration = duration + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if duration >= 600 & !isFourthZoneFinished:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "lastPhotoTimeOut")  # state transition
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if photoFourthZone.Check() & !isFourthZoneFinished:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SetExposure(arg = 2)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                isFourthZoneFinished = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif missionStage == 7:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                duration = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_l)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_shadow_f) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_shadow_g) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_punish_photo_seleka_m) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition

```
