```python
                                                                                                                                                                                                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                Global("chat_misaki", CreateMessengerChat(text_name_Misaki))
                                                                                                                                                                                                                chat_misaki.Add(text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_misaki_url, "Left", user = text_name_Misaki, usercolor = colors.blue, silent = false)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif missionStage == 8:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetText(text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_notice_e)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_seleka_x)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if subDur >= maxSubDur & _state.Position.stage == "Apart":
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif missionStage == 9:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionPanel.SetText(text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_notice_h)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        checkInit = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_seleka_y)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_seleka_z) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_seleka_aa) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_shadow_j) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if checkInit == null:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                checkInit = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                errorInit = null
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetText(text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_notice_h)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_seleka_y)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_seleka_z) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_seleka_aa) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_shadow_j) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if _state.Position.stage != "Apart":
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if errorInit == null:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                errorInit = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                checkInit = null
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetText(text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_notice_i)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetText(text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_notice_f)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif missionStage == 10:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                duration = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if dogezaCondition.Check():
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        else:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                duration = duration + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if duration >= 10:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "notDogeza")  # state transition
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif missionStage == 11:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        duration = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_shadow_m)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_listener_chapter_1_cp3_shadow_n, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition
```

## `listener_noice.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\失控的代价\listener_noice.code`

### 顶层代码 (on load)

```python

```

### 标签

#### `InitNoticeSystem:` (21 行)

> 首行: `tempPanel = CreateMissionPanel()`

```python
tempPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
tempPanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)
tempPanel.SetVisible(false)
Global("notice_panel", tempPanel)
tempText = CreateText()
tempText.SetSize(50)
tempText.SetAnchor(0.5, 0.7)
tempEnum = CreateList()
tempEnum.panel = 0
tempEnum.subtitle = 1
tempEnum.both = 2
Global("notice_mode", tempEnum)

Global("notice_subtitle", tempText)
Global("notice_data", null)
Global("notice_active", false)
Global("notice_timer", 0)
Global("notice_duration", 3)
Global("listener_notice", CreateListener("listener_notice"))


```

#### `SendNotice:` (14 行)

> 首行: `if duration == null`

```python
if duration == null:
        duration = 3
        if mode == null:
                mode = notice_mode.panel
                if color == null:
                        color = colors.white
                        noticeData = CreateList()
                        noticeData.text = text
                        noticeData.duration = duration
                        noticeData.mode = mode
                        noticeData.color = color
                        notice_data = noticeData


```

#### `listener_notice:` (20 行)

> 首行: `if notice_data != null & !notice_active`

```python
if notice_data != null & !notice_active:
        currentText = notice_data.text
        currentMode = notice_data.mode
        currentColor = notice_data.color
        notice_duration = notice_data.duration

if currentMode == notice_mode.panel | currentMode == notice_mode.both:
        notice_panel.SetText(currentText)
        notice_panel.SetVisible(true)
        if currentMode == notice_mode.subtitle | currentMode == notice_mode.both:
                notice_subtitle.Add(text = currentText, duration = notice_duration, facecolor = currentColor)
                notice_timer = 0
                notice_active = true
                notice_data = null
                if notice_active:
                        notice_timer = notice_timer + _timediff
                        if notice_timer >= notice_duration:
                                notice_panel.SetVisible(false)
                                notice_active = false
                                notice_timer = 0
```

---

## `listener_prologue.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\失控的代价\listener_prologue.code`

### 标签

#### `listener_welcome:` (44 行)

> 首行: `if isInit == null`

```python
if isInit == null:
        isInit = true
        welcomeArea = CreateAreaEx(coordList = coord_welcome)
        welcomeZone = CreateZone(welcomeArea)
        skipPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
        skipPanel.SetVisible(false)
        skipPanel.SetText(text_skip_intro)
        skipPanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)
        skipCondition = CreateCondition("Action_GanimataKoshiHeko")
        skipDuration = 0
        subDur = 0
        maxSubDur = 0
        if welcomeZone.Inside():
                if subInit == null:
                        skipPanel.SetVisible(true)
                        subInit = true
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_welcome_a, duration = 2)
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_welcome_b) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_welcome_c, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_welcome_d) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_welcome_e) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_welcome_f, duration = 5, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_welcome_g) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_welcome_h) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_welcome_i) + maxSubDur
                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                ClearSubtitle()
                                thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition
                                elif skipCondition.Check():
                                        skipDuration = skipDuration + _timediff
                                        if skipDuration >= 2:
                                                ClearSubtitle()
                                                SetAction("None")
                                                thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition
                                                else:
                                                        skipDuration = 0
                                                        else:
                                                                ClearSubtitle()
                                                                skipPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                                subInit = null
                                                                subDur = 0
                                                                skipDuration = 0

```

#### `listener_prologue_cp1_start:` (358 行)

> 首行: `if isInit == null`

```python
if isInit == null:
        isInit = true
        missionPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
        missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
        missionPanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)
        sittingCondition = CreateCondition("Sitting")
        exposedCondition = CreateCondition("(Exposed_Front, Exposed_Upper, Exposed_Hip)")
        walkCondition = CreateCondition("Action_ChikubiRotate")
        hipCondition = CreateCondition("Exposed_Hip")
        isGoHome = false
        duration = 0
        missionStage = 0
        infoLog = "prologue_cp1_start:"
        infoIndex = 0



if missionStage == 0:
        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                duration = 0
                SetStage(coord_prologue_start.stage, daytime = false)
                DressCosplay(cosplayList = cosplay_school)
                if _state.Position.stage == "Residence":
                        SetPlayerPositionEx(coordList = coord_prologue_start)
                        SendNotice(text = text_chapter_head_prologue, color = colors.orange, duration = 5, mode = notice_mode.subtitle)
                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                        elif missionStage == 1:
                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                        subDur = 0
                                        maxSubDur = 0
                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_a)
                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_b) + maxSubDur
                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_c, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_d) + maxSubDur
                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_e) + maxSubDur
                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_f) + maxSubDur
                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_g) + maxSubDur
                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_h) + maxSubDur
                                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                                missionPanel.SetText(text_prologue_cp1_start_notice_a)
                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                elif missionStage == 2:
                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                duration = 0
                                                                isIndulgence = null
                                                                if sittingCondition.Check():
                                                                        SetIndulgence(arg = -3)
                                                                        isIndulgence = false
                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                        elif exposedCondition.Check() & _state.Position.stage != "Apart":
                                                                                duration = duration + _timediff
                                                                                if duration >= 5:
                                                                                        missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                                                        SetIndulgence(arg = 5)
                                                                                        isIndulgence = true
                                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                        elif missionStage == 3:
                                                                                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                        isChanged = false
                                                                                                        if isIndulgence:
                                                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                                        if restrainInit == null:
                                                                                                                                restrainInit = true
                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                                                                                                subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_sitting_a)
                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_sitting_b, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_sitting_c) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_sitting_d) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_sitting_e) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_sitting_f) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_sitting_g) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_sitting_h) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_sitting_i) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_sitting_j) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_sitting_k) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_sitting_l) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                                                if exposedCondition.Check():
                                                                                                                                        if isChanged == false:
                                                                                                                                                isChanged = true
                                                                                                                                                ClearSubtitle()
                                                                                                                                                subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                isIndulgence = true

if maxSubDur > 0:
        if subDur >= maxSubDur:



missionStage = missionStage + 1
else:
        missionStage = missionStage + 1
        elif missionStage == 4:
                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                        if isIndulgence:
                                if isChanged:
                                        SetIndulgence(arg = 10)
                                        else:
                                                SetIndulgence(arg = -5)
                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                elif missionStage == 5:
                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                checkTimer = 0
                                                                if isIndulgence:
                                                                        if indulgenceInit == null:
                                                                                indulgenceInit = true
                                                                                subDur = 0
                                                                                maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                if isChanged:
                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_where_cloth) + maxSubDur
                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_impulse_a) + maxSubDur
                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_impulse_b) + maxSubDur
                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_impulse_c) + maxSubDur
                                                                                        if isChanged:
                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_impulse_c_a) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_impulse_c_b) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                if !isChanged:
                                                                                                        if walkInit == null:
                                                                                                                walkInit = true
                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_impulse_d) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_impulse_e) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_impulse_f) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_impulse_g) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_impulse_h) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                                if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                        else:
                                                                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                elif missionStage == 6:
                                                                                                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                walkInit = null
                                                                                                                                                indulgenceInit = null
                                                                                                                                                if isIndulgence:
                                                                                                                                                        if isChanged:
                                                                                                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                                                                                        if walkInit == null:
                                                                                                                                                                                walkInit = true
                                                                                                                                                                                checkTimer = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                totalDistance = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                requiredDistance = 30
                                                                                                                                                                                maxPendingDistance = 5
                                                                                                                                                                                checkDistance = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                lastPos = _state.Position
                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetText(text_prologue_cp1_start_notice_nipple)
                                                                                                                                                                                checkTimer = checkTimer + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                if checkTimer >= 0.1:
                                                                                                                                                                                        checkTimer = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                        if walkCondition.Check():
                                                                                                                                                                                                if _stagechanged:
                                                                                                                                                                                                        if _state.Position.stage == "Apart":
                                                                                                                                                                                                                totalDistance = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                pendingDistance = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                lastPos = _state.Position
                                                                                                                                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        exitcoord = GetTransitionCoords(fromStage = _state.Position.laststage, currentStage = _state.Position.stage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        delta = Vector3Sub(exitcoord, lastPos)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        pendingDistance = Vector3Length(delta)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        totalDistance = totalDistance + pendingDistance
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        lastPos = _state.Position
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        pendingDistance = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        currentPos = _state.Position
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        delta = Vector3Sub(currentPos, lastPos)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        frameDistance = Vector3Length(delta)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        pendingDistance = frameDistance
                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if pendingDistance >= maxPendingDistance:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                totalDistance = totalDistance + pendingDistance
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                pendingDistance = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                lastPos = currentPos
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                checkDistance = totalDistance + pendingDistance
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if checkDistance >= requiredDistance:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        else:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                totalDistance = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                pendingDistance = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                lastPos = _state.Position
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif missionStage == 7:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if isIndulgence & !isChanged:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_nipple_a) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_nipple_b) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_nipple_c) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_nipple_d) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_nipple_e) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_nipple_f) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_nipple_g) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_nipple_h, color = colors.yellow) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_nipple_i) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if !isIndulgence:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_gohome_a) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_gohome_b, color = colors.yellow) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if maxSubDur > 0:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        else:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif missionStage == 8:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                isHipExposed = false
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetText(text_prologue_cp1_start_notice_gohome)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if _state.Position.stage == "Apart":
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        isGoHome = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif isIndulgence & !isChanged & hipCondition.Check():
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                isHipExposed = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif !isIndulgence & exposedCondition.Check():
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        isIndulgence = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        isChanged = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif missionStage == 9:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if !isIndulgence:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp1_start_result_level1_a)
```

```python
        isInit = true
        missionPanel = CreateMissionPanel()

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if anger > 4:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                anger = anger + 4

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        anger + anger + 2
```
