                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_submission_dildo_qa_successed_a)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_submission_dildo_qa_successed_b) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_submission_dildo_qa_successed_c) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_submission_dildo_qa_successed_d) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_submission_dildo_qa_successed_e) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_submission_dildo_qa_successed_f) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_submission_dildo_qa_successed_g) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_submission_dildo_qa_successed_h) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_submission_dildo_qa_successed_i) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_submission_dildo_qa_successed_j) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_submission_dildo_qa_successed_k) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if angerLevel == 0:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if isQaSuccessed:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        subDur = subDur + _timediff
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                save_value.prologueSucceeded = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "dildoQAFailed")  # state transition
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        else:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_submission_punishment_b) + maxSubDur

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_submission_punishment_e) + maxSubDur

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_submission_punishment_k) + maxSubDur

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if qaChoose > 0:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetVisible(false)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif qaChoose == 2:

#### `listener_prologue_cp2_punish:` (224 行)

> 首行: `if isInit == null`

```python
if isInit == null:
        isInit = true
        missionPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
        missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
        missionPanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)
        detectionPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
        detectionPanel.SetVisible(false)
        detectionPanel.SetText(text_about_to_be_exposed)
        detectionPanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)
        missionCondition = CreateCondition("[(Action_UseDildoFloorPussy1, Action_UseDildoFloorAnal1, Action_UseDildoWallPussy1, Action_UseDildoWallAnal1), InLight]")
        exposedCondition = CreateCondition("(Exposed_Front, Exposed_Hip, Exposed_Upper)")
        detectionCondition = CreateCondition("[ShowingOff, Watched]")
        save_value.prologuePunishFinishTwo = false
        isParkFinished = false
        isResidenceFinished = false
        isStationFrontFinished = false
        isUsedDildo = false
        finishedCount = 0
        isParkShowSub = false
        isResidenceShowSub = false
        isStationFrontShowSub = false
        isGoOut = false
        isReady = false
        qaChoose = 0
        duration = 0
        missionDuration = 0
        detectionDuration = 0
        missionStage = 0
        infoLog = "listener_prologue_cp2_punish:"
        infoIndex = 0

if isGoOut:
        missionDuration = missionDuration + _timediff
        if missionDuration >= 900:
                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "missionTimeOut")  # state transition
                if !exposedCondition.Check():
                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "notExposed")  # state transition
                        if isUsedDildo & (!isParkFinished | !isResidenceFinished | !isStationFrontFinished) & _state.Action == "None":
                                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "actionBroken")  # state transition
                                if _state.Position.stage != "Apart" & detectionCondition.Check():
                                        detectionDuration = detectionDuration + _timediff
                                        detectionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                        detectionPanel.SetGaugeProgress(detectionDuration / 2.5)
                                        detectionPanel.SetGaugeVisible(true)
                                        if detectionDuration >= 2.5:
                                                detectionPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "detection")  # state transition
                                                else:
                                                        detectionDuration = 0
                                                        detectionPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                        detectionPanel.SetGaugeProgress(0)
                                                        elif !isReady:
                                                                if _state.Position.stage != "Apart":
                                                                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "runAway")  # state transition

if missionStage == 0:
        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                subDur = 0
                maxSubDur = 0
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_a)
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_b) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_c) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_d, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_e) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_f) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_g) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_h, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_i) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_j) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_k, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_l, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_m, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_n, color = colors.yellow) + maxSubDur
                subDur = subDur + _timediff
                if subDur >= maxSubDur:
                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                        elif missionStage == 1:
                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                        missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                        missionPanel.SetText("失控的代价：\n1分钟之内，保持至少一种暴露状态，然后出门！")
                                        duration = 0
                                        isReady = true
                                        duration = duration + _timediff
                                        if _state.Position.stage == "Residence" & exposedCondition.Check():
                                                isGoOut = true
                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                else:
                                                        duration = duration + _timediff
                                                        if duration >= 60:
                                                                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "goOutTimeOut")  # state transition
                                                                elif missionStage == 2:
                                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                                                                missionPanel.SetText(text_prologue_cp2_punish_running_notice)
                                                                                if _state.Position.stage == "Park" & !isParkFinished:
                                                                                        if !isParkShowSub:
                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_in_park, duration = 3)
                                                                                                isParkShowSub = true
                                                                                                if missionCondition.Check():
                                                                                                        isUsedDildo = true
                                                                                                        if _state.Orgasm:
                                                                                                                isParkFinished = true
                                                                                                                finishedCount = finishedCount + 1
                                                                                                                isUsedDildo = false
                                                                                                                if finishedCount == 1:
                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_1_msg)
                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_1_sub_a, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_1_sub_b, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_1_sub_c, duration = 3, color = colors.yellow)
                                                                                                                        elif finishedCount == 2:
                                                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_2_sub_a, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_2_sub_b, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_2_sub_c, duration = 3, color = colors.yellow)
                                                                                                                                elif finishedCount == 3:
                                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_3_msg)
                                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_3_sub_a, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_3_sub_b, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_3_sub_c, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                        else:
                                                                                                                                                isUsedDildo = false
                                                                                                                                                elif _state.Position.stage == "Residence" & !isResidenceFinished:
                                                                                                                                                        if !isResidenceShowSub:
                                                                                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_in_residence_a, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_in_residence_b, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_in_residence_c, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                                                isResidenceShowSub = true
                                                                                                                                                                if missionCondition.Check():
                                                                                                                                                                        isUsedDildo = true
                                                                                                                                                                        if _state.Orgasm:
                                                                                                                                                                                isResidenceFinished = true
                                                                                                                                                                                finishedCount = finishedCount + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                isUsedDildo = false
                                                                                                                                                                                if finishedCount == 1:
                                                                                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_1_msg)
                                                                                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_1_sub_a, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_1_sub_b, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_1_sub_c, duration = 3, color = colors.yellow)
                                                                                                                                                                                        elif finishedCount == 2:
                                                                                                                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_2_sub_a, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_2_sub_b, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_2_sub_c, duration = 3, color = colors.yellow)
                                                                                                                                                                                                elif finishedCount == 3:
                                                                                                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_3_msg)
                                                                                                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_3_sub_a, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_3_sub_b, duration = 3)

                                                                                                                                                                                                        else:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif _state.Position.stage == "StationFront" & !isStationFrontFinished:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_2_sub_b, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_2_sub_c, duration = 3, color = colors.yellow)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif finishedCount == 3:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_3_msg)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_3_sub_a, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_3_sub_b, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_3_sub_c, duration = 3)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        else:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                isUsedDildo = false
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if !missionCondition.Check():
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                isUsedDildo = false
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if _state.Position.stage == "Apart" & isGoOut:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif missionStage == 3:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if finishedCount == 0:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "finishedNone")  # state transition
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif finishedCount == 1:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "finishedOne")  # state transition
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif finishedCount == 3:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif finishedCount == 2:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        save_value.prologuePunishFinishTwo = true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif missionStage == 4:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        qaChoose = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ShowQA(qaList = list_text_qa_prologue_cp2_punish_finished_two)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionPanel.SetVisible(true)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        missionPanel.SetText(text_qa_choose)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        qaChoose = ChooseQA(optionCount = 2)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if qaChoose > 0:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SetAction("None")
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionPanel.SetVisible(false)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ClearQA()
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                missionStage = missionStage + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                elif missionStage == 5:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        if infoIndex == missionStage:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                StageInfo(log = infoLog + missionStage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                infoIndex = infoIndex + 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                subDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                if qaChoose == 1:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        elif qaChoose == 2:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                thread.goto(failedcheckpoint, failReason = "admit")  # state transition

```

#### `listener_prologue_cp2_go_home_check:` (13 行)

> 首行: `if isInit == null`

```python
if isInit == null:
        isInit = true
        checkPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
        checkPanel.SetVisible(false)
        checkPanel.SetGaugeVisible(false)
        checkPanel.SetText(text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_notice_gohome)
        if _state.Position.stage == "Apart":
                checkPanel.SetVisible(false)
                thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition
                else:
                        checkPanel.SetVisible(true)


```

#### `listener_prologue_result:` (14 行)

> 首行: `if duration == null`

```python
if duration == null:
        duration = 0
        maxDuration = 7
        isResult = false
        if global_sleep_interact_area.Check() & !isResult:
                ShowDailyResult()
                SaveData()
                isResult = true
                if isResult:
                        duration = duration + _timediff
                        if duration >= maxDuration:
                                SetDaytime()
                                thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition

```

#### `listener_prologue_errorcheck:` (5 行)

> 首行: `if _state.Position.stage != "Apart"`

```python
if _state.Position.stage != "Apart":
        ClearSubtitle()
        thread.goto(nextcheckpoint, returncheckpoint = returncheckpoint)  # state transition


```

#### `listener_return_checkpoint:` (3 行)

> 首行: `if _state.Position.stage == "Apart"`

```python
if _state.Position.stage == "Apart":
        thread.goto(returncheckpoint)  # state transition

```

#### `listener_prologue_reset:` (3 行)

> 首行: `if global_sleep_interact_area.Check()`

```python
if global_sleep_interact_area.Check():
        ResetData()
        thread.goto(nextcheckpoint)  # state transition
```

## `main.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\drop bra and panties\main.code`

### 顶层代码 (on load)

```python














thread = create_thread("main")




```

### 标签

#### `main:` (34 行)

> 首行: `all_bras = CreateList("m_cosplay_general_upper_bra","m_cosplay_general_upper_chack_bikini_bra","m_cosplay_general_upper_micro_bikini_bra","m_cosplay_cow_bra")`

```python

all_bras = CreateList("m_cosplay_general_upper_bra","m_cosplay_general_upper_chack_bikini_bra","m_cosplay_general_upper_micro_bikini_bra","m_cosplay_cow_bra")

all_panties = CreateList("m_cosplay_general_upper_race_pants","m_cosplay_general_upper_ultimate_pants","m_cosplay_general_upper_chack_bikini_pants","m_cosplay_general_upper_micro_bikini_pants","m_cosplay_succubus_cosplay_pants","m_cosplay_sister_pants","m_cosplay_cow_pants","m_cosplay_suit_chic_panty","m_cosplay_sweater_pants")


putonbra_condition = CreateCondition("Action_TakeOnBra")

putonpanties_condition = CreateCondition("Action_TakeOnPants")

dropped_bra_condition = CreateItemCondition(itemtype = "Bra")

dropped_panties_condition = CreateItemCondition(itemtype = "Pants")

listener_bra = null
listener_panties = null
listener_start = create_listener("init")


data = CreateList()
data.Bra = CreateList()
data.Bra.actionOn = "TakeOnBra"
data.Bra.actionOff = "TakeOffBra"
data.Bra.animTimeOff = 2.8
data.Bra.animTimeOn = CreateList(2.52,3.0,4.0)
data.Pants = CreateList()
data.Pants.actionOn = "TakeOnPants"
data.Pants.actionOff = "TakeOffPants"
data.Pants.animTimeOff = 3.0
data.Pants.animTimeOn = CreateList(2.52,4.7,5.0)




```

#### `init:` (64 行)

> 首行: `if _state.Position.stage != "Apart"`

```python
if _state.Position.stage != "Apart":
        if _state.Position.laststage == "Apart":

if _save.Bra == null:

data.Bra.worn = CreateList()
i = 0
while i<all_bras.Count():
        if _state.Cosplay[all_bras[i]] == true:
                data.Bra.worn.Insert(all_bras[i])
                i = i + 1


data.Bra.worn_condition = create_cosplay_condition(items = data.Bra.worn, type = "all")

data.Bra.any_worn_condition = create_cosplay_condition(items = data.Bra.worn, type = "any")

listener_bra = create_listener("droppickup", itemtype = "Bra", worn_items = data.Bra.worn, worn_condition = data.Bra.worn_condition, any_worn_condition = data.Bra.any_worn_condition, puton_condition = putonbra_condition)
else:

data.Bra.worn = _save.Bra
data.Bra.worn_condition = create_cosplay_condition(items = data.Bra.worn, type = "all")
data.Bra.any_worn_condition = create_cosplay_condition(items = data.Bra.worn, type = "any")
listener_bra = create_listener("droppickup", itemtype = "Bra", worn_items = data.Bra.worn, worn_condition = null, any_worn_condition = data.Bra.any_worn_condition, puton_condition = putonbra_condition)


if _save.Pants == null:
        data.Pants.worn = CreateList()
        i = 0
        while i<all_panties.Count():
                if _state.Cosplay[all_panties[i]] == true:
                        data.Pants.worn.Insert(all_panties[i])
                        i = i + 1

data.Pants.worn_condition = create_cosplay_condition(items = data.Pants.worn, type = "all")
data.Pants.any_worn_condition = create_cosplay_condition(items = data.Pants.worn, type = "any")
listener_panties = create_listener("droppickup", itemtype = "Pants", worn_items = data.Pants.worn, worn_condition = data.Pants.worn_condition, any_worn_condition = data.Pants.any_worn_condition, puton_condition = putonpanties_condition)
else:
        data.Pants.worn = _save.Pants
        data.Pants.worn_condition = create_cosplay_condition(items = data.Pants.worn, type = "all")
        data.Pants.any_worn_condition = create_cosplay_condition(items = data.Pants.worn, type = "any")
        listener_panties = create_listener("droppickup", itemtype = "Pants", worn_items = data.Pants.worn, worn_condition = null, any_worn_condition = data.Pants.any_worn_condition, puton_condition = putonpanties_condition)


else:

listener_bra = null
listener_panties = null


if (_save.Bra != null) | (_save.Pants != null):
        if !dropped_bra_condition.Check() & !dropped_panties_condition.Check():
                if _save.Bra != null:
                        OwnCosplay(_save.Bra, owns = true)
                        _save.Bra = null
                        if _save.Pants != null:
                                OwnCosplay(_save.Pants, owns = true)
                                _save.Pants = null






```

#### `droppickup:` (59 行)

> 首行: `if drop == null`

```python
if drop == null:
        drop = -1
        if equip == null:
                equip = -1


if (worn_condition != null) & (drop<0):
        if !worn_condition.Check():
                drop = 0
                SetAction(data[itemtype].actionOff)
                worn_condition = null

elif drop >= 0:
        drop = drop + _timediff
        if drop >= data[itemtype].animTimeOff:
                OwnCosplay(worn_items, owns = false)
                DropItem(itemtype = itemtype, position = _state.Position)
                _save[itemtype] = worn_items
                worn_condition = null
                drop = -1

elif equip >= 0:
        if equip == 0:
                SetAction("PickUpItem")
                CollectItem(itemtype = itemtype)
                equip = equip + _timediff

if (equip >= data[itemtype].animTimeOn[0]) & (!did_pickup):
        did_pickup = true
        SetAction(data[itemtype].actionOn)

if (equip >= data[itemtype].animTimeOn[1]) & (!did_equip):
        OwnCosplay(_save[itemtype], owns = true)
        EquipCosplay(_save[itemtype])
        _save[itemtype] = null
        did_equip = true

if equip >= data[itemtype].animTimeOn[2]:
        equip = -1
        worn_condition = create_cosplay_condition(items = worn_items, type = "all")

elif puton_condition.Check():
        equip = 0
        did_equip = false
        did_pickup = false

elif any_worn_condition.Check():

OwnCosplay(_save[itemtype], owns = false)










```

#### `create_cosplay_condition:` (12 行)

> 首行: `i = 0`

```python
i = 0
s = ""
while i<items.Count():
        if s != "":
                s = s + ","
                s = s + "Cosplay_" + items[i]
                i = i + 1
                if type == "all":
                        return CreateCondition("["+s+"]")
                        else:
                                return CreateCondition("("+s+")")

```

if time == null:
        time = 0
        time = time + _timediff
        if time > duration:
                if data[index].text != null:
                        if data[index].user == null:
                                chat.Add(data[index].text, data[index].align, silent=true)

## `main.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\NPC_type\main.code`

### 顶层代码 (on load)

```python



















mainthread = create_thread("main")
walkthread = create_thread("walk")
blindthread = create_thread("blind")




```

### 标签

#### `main:` (67 行)

> 首行: `thread = _this`

```python
thread = _this

npcs = CreateList()








npctypes = CreateList()
npctypes.Insert(CreateList(type="NewFemale", count=11, haircount=10, facecount=11))
npctypes.Insert(CreateList(type="NewMale", count=5, haircount=6, facecount=5))
npctypes.Insert(CreateList(type="PreviousFemale", count=15, haircount=7, facecount=1))
npctypes.Insert(CreateList(type="PreviousMale", count=12, haircount=5, facecount=1))
npctypes.Insert(CreateList(type="NewOba", count=2, haircount=1, facecount=1))
npctypes.Insert(CreateList(type="NewOji", count=3, haircount=1, facecount=1))




npctypelist = CreateList()
i = 0
while i < 6:
        npctypelist.Insert(npctypes[i].type)
        i = i + 1






npcspawninteract = CreateInteractArea(
stage = "Residence",
x = -25.27, y=-0.09, z=-116.5,
r = 0.5,
text = "Spawn NPCs",
options = npctypelist
)






listener = create_listener("select")

listener_smartphone = CreateListener(
"toggle_smartphone",
interact = CreateInteractArea(stage="Residence", x=-27.27, y=-0.09, z=-115.5, r=0.5, text="Toggle Smartphone")
)

listener_headset = CreateListener(
"toggle_headset",
interact = CreateInteractArea(stage="Residence", x=-27.27, y=-0.09, z=-114.5, r=0.5, text="Toggle Headset")
)

listener_glasses = CreateListener(
"toggle_glasses",
interact = CreateInteractArea(stage="Residence", x=-27.27, y=-0.09, z=-113.5, r=0.5, text="Toggle Glasses")
)





```

#### `select:` (36 行)

> 首行: `index = npcspawninteract.Check()`

```python
index = npcspawninteract.Check()

if index != null:
        npcs = CreateList()
        j = 0


while j < npctypes[index].count:








newnpc = CreateNPC(
npctypes[index].type,
position = Vector(-25.67, -0.08, -115.5 + 0.6 * j),
rotation = Quaternion(0, -0.707, 0, 0.707),
body = j,
size = 1,
face = j % npctypes[index].facecount,
hair = j % npctypes[index].haircount
)

newnpc.SkipStrangeness(true)
npcs.Insert(newnpc)

j = j + 1






```

#### `toggle_smartphone:` (6 行)

> 首行: `if interact.Check()`

```python
if interact.Check():
        i = npcs.Count() - 1
        while i >= 0:
                npcs[i].Smartphone(!npcs[i].Smartphone())
                i = i - 1

```

#### `toggle_headset:` (6 行)

> 首行: `if interact.Check()`

```python
if interact.Check():
        i = npcs.Count() - 1
        while i >= 0:
                npcs[i].Headset(!npcs[i].Headset())
                i = i - 1

```

#### `toggle_glasses:` (10 行)

> 首行: `if interact.Check()`

```python
if interact.Check():
        i = npcs.Count() - 1
        while i >= 0:
                npcs[i].Glasses(!npcs[i].Glasses())
                i = i - 1





```

#### `walk:` (22 行)

> 首行: `thread = _this`

```python
thread = _this

npc = null


interact = CreateInteractArea(
stage = "Residence",
x = -25.75, y=-0.09, z=-123.48,
r = 0.5,
text = "Spawn Walking NPC"
)

listener = create_listener("start")









```

#### `start:` (17 行)

> 首行: `if interact.Check()`

```python
if interact.Check():
        npc = CreateNPC(
        "NewMale",
        position = Vector(-24.61, -0.08, -124.13),
        rotation = Quaternion(0, 0.707, 0, 0.707)
        )



npc.AddWaypoint(2)
npc.AddWaypoint(Vector(-26.77, -0.08, -101.5), last=true)






```

#### `waitforplayer:` (10 行)

> 首行: `if (npc != null) && (npc.IsAlive())`

```python
if (npc != null) && (npc.IsAlive()):

newstop = Vector3Distance(_state.Position, npc.GetPosition()) > 2.5

if npc.Stopped() != newstop:
        npc.Stopped(newstop)




```

#### `autorespawn:` (14 行)

> 首行: `if (npc != null) && (!npc.IsAlive())`

```python
if (npc != null) && (!npc.IsAlive()):
        npc.Respawn()
        npc.AddWaypoint(2)
        npc.AddWaypoint(Vector(-26.77, -0.08, -101.5), last=true)










```

#### `blind:` (13 行)

> 首行: `npcs = CreateList()`

```python
npcs = CreateList()
npcslist = CreateList()

listener = create_listener("add_new_npcs")
listener2 = create_listener("clean_list")


listener_settings = create_listener("watchsettings", value=_settings.blind)





```

#### `add_new_npcs:` (17 行)

> 首行: `if _settings.blind`

```python
if _settings.blind:
        index = _state.NPCs.Count() - 1
        while index >= 0:
                id = _state.NPCs[index].ID


if (id < 1000000) && (npcs[id] == null):
        npcs[id] = CreateNPC(id)
        npcs[id].SkipStrangeness(true)
        npcslist.Insert(npcs[id])

index = index - 1





```

#### `clean_list:` (8 行)

> 首行: `if _stagechanged`

```python
if _stagechanged:
        npcs = CreateList()
        npcslist = CreateList()





```

#### `watchsettings:` (8 行)

> 首行: `if value != _settings.blind`

```python
if value != _settings.blind:
        value = _settings.blind
        index = npcslist.Count() - 1
        while index >= 0:
                if npcslist[index].IsAlive():
                        npcslist[index].SkipStrangeness(value)
                        index = index - 1

```

## `main.code`
