### 标签

#### `main:` (9 行)

> 首行: `Log(output="init")`

```python
Log(output="init")
If(true) [
Log(output="true branch")
] [
Log(output="false branch")
Log(output="end")
return null

```

---

## `main.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\失控的代价\main.code`

### 顶层代码 (on load)

```python
main = create_thread("main")
```

### 标签

#### `main:` (44 行)

> 首行: `thread = _this`

```python



thread = _this
InitGlobalConfig()
InitSaveData()
InitGlobalCoords()
InitAllTexts()
InitNoticeSystem()
InitEndingNoticeSystem()
InitCosplayConfig()
LoadData()
InitDailyResultUI()

Global("DEBUG_LOG", true)
Global("DEBUG", false)
Global("global_sleep_interact_area", null)
Global("global_result_listener", null)
Global("global_detection_listener", null)

if save_value.isEnterResult:
        if global_result_listener == null:
                global_result_listener = create_listener("listener_global_daily_result")
                else:
                        global_sleep_interact_area = null
                        global_result_listener = null
                        listenerEndCheck = create_listener("listener_global_end_check")


isInWaitingRoom = false
exhibitionismCondition = CreateCondition("[Skill_Exhibitionism, Skill_HideStrangeUi]")
listenerActivating = create_listener("listener_check_skill_disable", condition = exhibitionismCondition, nextcheckpoint = "waiting_room")

if global_detection_listener == null & save_value.isEnableCamouflage:
        global_detection_listener = create_listener("listener_monitor_detection")

if DEBUG & exhibitionismCondition.Check():
        save_value.isEnterResult = true
        thread.goto('chapter_1_cp1_meet')  # state transition
        else:
                thread.goto('checkSave')  # state transition



```

#### `checkSave:` (7 行)

> 首行: `if exhibitionismCondition.Check()`

```python
if exhibitionismCondition.Check():
        if save_checkpoint == null:
                thread.goto('welcome')  # state transition
                else:
                        current_checkpoint = save_checkpoint
                        thread.goto(save_checkpoint)  # state transition

```


```python
current_checkpoint = "prologue_cp2_threat_failed"
maxSubDur = 0
ClearSubtitle()
panel = CreateMissionPanel()
panel.SetVisible(true)
panel.SetGaugeVisible(false)
panel.SetText(text_notice_sub_warring)
if failReason == "firstQAFailed":
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_first_qa_a)
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_first_qa_b) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_first_qa_c) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_first_qa_d) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_first_qa_e) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_first_qa_f) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_first_qa_g) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_first_qa_h) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_first_qa_i) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_first_qa_j) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_first_qa_k) + maxSubDur
        elif failReason == "dildoTimeOut":

maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_dildo_time_out_a)
maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_dildo_time_out_b) + maxSubDur
maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_dildo_time_out_c) + maxSubDur
maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_dildo_time_out_d) + maxSubDur
elif failReason == "standTimeOut":
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_stand_time_out_a)
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_stand_time_out_b) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_stand_time_out_c) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_stand_time_out_d) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_stand_time_out_e) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_stand_time_out_f) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_stand_time_out_g) + maxSubDur
        elif failReason == "dildoQAFailed":
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_dildo_qa_a)
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_dildo_qa_b) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_dildo_qa_c) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_dildo_qa_d) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_dildo_qa_e) + maxSubDur
                elif failReason =="punishmentQAFailed":
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_punishment_qa_a)
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_punishment_qa_b) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_punishment_qa_c) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_punishment_qa_d) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_punishment_qa_e) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_punishment_qa_f) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_punishment_qa_g, duration = 2) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_punishment_qa_h) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_punishment_qa_i) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_threat_failed_punishment_qa_j, duration = 2) + maxSubDur
                        else:
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_sub_check_error, duration = 5, color = colors.red)
                                sublistener = create_listener("listener_sub_await", maxSubDur = maxSubDur, nextcheckpoint = "prologue_cp2_punish", skip = true)
```

```python
current_checkpoint = "prologue_cp2_punish_successed"
save_value.prologueSucceeded = true
if save_checkpoint != current_checkpoint:
        save_checkpoint = current_checkpoint
        if save_value.prologuePunishFinishTwo == false:
                SetExposure(arg = -5)
                SaveData(savecp = true)
                maxSubDur = 0
                panel = CreateMissionPanel()
                panel.SetVisible(true)
                panel.SetGaugeVisible(false)
                panel.SetText(text_notice_sub_warring)

                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_success_b) + maxSubDur
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_success_c) + maxSubDur

                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_success_e) + maxSubDur
                errorchecklistener = create_listener("listener_prologue_errorcheck", nextcheckpoint = "prologue_errorcheck", returncheckpoint = current_checkpoint)
                sublistener = create_listener("listener_sub_await", maxSubDur = maxSubDur, nextcheckpoint = "prologue_result", skip = true)
```

#### `prologue_cp2_punish_failed:` (54 行)

> 首行: `current_checkpoint = "prologue_cp2_punish_failed"`

```python
current_checkpoint = "prologue_cp2_punish_failed"
save_value.prologueSucceeded = false
maxSubDur = 0
ClearSubtitle()
MissionFailed()
if failReason == "runAway":

SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_run_away_a, notice = false)
SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_run_away_b, notice = false)
SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_run_away_c, notice = false)
elif failReason == "missionTimeOut":

SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_mission_time_out_a, notice = false)
SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_mission_time_out_b, notice = false)
SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_mission_time_out_c, notice = false)
elif failReason == "notExposed":

SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_not_exposed_a, notice = false)
SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_not_exposed_b, notice = false)
SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_not_exposed_c, notice = false)
elif failReason == "detection":

SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_detection_a, notice = false)
SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_detection_b, notice = false)
SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_detection_c, notice = false)
elif failReason == "actionBroken":

SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_action_broken_a, notice = false)
SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_action_broken_b, notice = false)
SendMessageChat(msg = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_msg_action_broken_c, notice = false)
elif failReason == "goOutTimeOut":

maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_go_out_time_out_a, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_go_out_time_out_b, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
elif failReason == "finishedNone":

maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_none, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
elif failReason == "finishedOne":

maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finish_one, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
elif failReason == "admit":

maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_finished_two_admit, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur


if failReason == "runAway" | failReason == "missionTimeOut" | failReason == "notExposed" | failReason == "detection" | failReason == "actionBroken":
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_gohome_sub_a) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_gohome_sub_b) + maxSubDur
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_prologue_cp2_punish_failed_gohome_sub_c) + maxSubDur
        if maxSubDur > 0:
                sublistener = create_listener("listener_sub_await", maxSubDur = maxSubDur, nextcheckpoint = "prologue_cp2_punish_failed_check")
                else:
                        thread.goto('prologue_cp2_punish_failed_check')  # state transition

```

```python
panel = CreateMissionPanel()
panel.SetVisible(true)
panel.SetText(text_prologue_stage_error)
panel.SetGaugeVisible(false)
listener = create_listener("listener_return_checkpoint", returncheckpoint = returncheckpoint)




```

#### `chapter_1_cp1_edge_failed:` (25 行)

> 首行: `current_checkpoint = "chapter_1_cp1_edge_failed"`

```python
current_checkpoint = "chapter_1_cp1_edge_failed"
ClearSubtitle()
maxSubDur = 0
if failReason == "expose":
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_punish_expose_a, color = colors.red)
        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_punish_expose_b, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
        sublistener = create_listener("listener_sub_await", maxSubDur = maxSubDur, nextcheckpoint = "chapter_1_cp1_edge_failed_final")
        elif failReason == "runaway":
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_punish_runaway_a, color = colors.red)
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_punish_runaway_b, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                sublistener = create_listener("listener_sub_await", maxSubDur = maxSubDur, nextcheckpoint = "chapter_1_cp1_edge_failed_final")
                elif failReason == "timeout":
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_punish_timeout_a, color = colors.red)
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_punish_timeout_b, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_punish_timeout_c, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_punish_timeout_d, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                        sublistener = create_listener("listener_sub_await", maxSubDur = maxSubDur, nextcheckpoint = "chapter_1_cp1_edge_failed_final")
                        elif failReason == "none":
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_failed_a)
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_failed_b) + maxSubDur
                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_cp1_edge_failed_c) + maxSubDur
                                sublistener = create_listener("listener_sub_await", maxSubDur = maxSubDur, nextcheckpoint = "chapter_1_cp1_edge_failed_final")
                                else:
                                        thread.goto('chapter_1_cp1_edge_failed_final')  # state transition

```

#### `chapter_1_find_earphone_failed:` (79 行)

> 首行: `current_checkpoint = "chapter_1_find_earphone_failed"`

```python
current_checkpoint = "chapter_1_find_earphone_failed"
ClearSubtitle()
maxSubDur = 0
MissionFailed()
if failReason == "rotorTimeOut":
        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_rotor_a, notice = false)
        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_punish, notice = false)
        elif failReason == "night":
                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_night_a, notice = false)
                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_punish, notice = false)
                elif failReason == "rule":
                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_rule_a, notice = false)
                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_punish, notice = false)
                        elif failReason == "notGoOut":
                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_notgo_a, notice = false)
                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_punish, notice = false)
                                elif failReason == "arriveTimeOut":
                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_arrive_a, notice = false)
                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_punish, notice = false)
                                        elif failReason == "handcuffTimeOut":
                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_handcuff_a, notice = false)
                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_punish, notice = false)
                                                elif failReason == "handcuffOff":
                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_handoff_a, notice = false)
                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_punish, notice = false)
                                                        elif failReason == "notLook":
                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_notlook_a, notice = false)
                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_notlook_b, notice = false)
                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_notlook_c, notice = false)
                                                                elif failReason == "walkFailed":
                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_walk_a, notice = false)
                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_punish, notice = false)
                                                                        elif failReason == "walkBroken":
                                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_broken_a, notice = false)
                                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_punish, notice = false)
                                                                                elif failReason == "walkTimeOut":
                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_walktime_a, notice = false)
                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_punish, notice = false)
                                                                                        elif failReason == "timeOut":
                                                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_timeout_a, notice = false)
                                                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_punish, notice = false)
                                                                                                elif failReason == "bustle":
                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_bustle_a, notice = false)
                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_punish, notice = false)
                                                                                                        elif failReason == "eyemaskTimeOut":
                                                                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_eyetime_a, notice = false)
                                                                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_punish, notice = false)
                                                                                                                elif failReason == "eyemask":
                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_eyemask_a, notice = false)
                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_punish, notice = false)
                                                                                                                        elif failReason == "hipShakeTimeOut":
                                                                                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_hiptime_a, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_hiptime_b, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_hiptime_c, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                if !save_value.isEnableCamouflage:
                                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_nocamo_a, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_nocamo_b, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_seleka_a, duration = 4, color = colors.red)
                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_seleka_b, duration = 4, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_seleka_c, duration = 4, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                        if save_value.isGetEarphone:
                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_earphone_a) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_earphone_b, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_earphone_c, color = colors.red) + maxSubDur
                                                                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_noear_a, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_noear_b, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                                        if !save_value.isEnableCamouflage:
                                                                                                                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_noear_c, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_noear_e, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_noear_d, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_noear_e, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_noear_f, notice = false)
                                                                                                                                                                        if maxSubDur > 0:
                                                                                                                                                                                sublistener = create_listener("listener_sub_await", maxSubDur = maxSubDur, nextcheckpoint = "chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_final")
                                                                                                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                                                                                                        thread.goto('chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_final')  # state transition

```

```python
current_checkpoint = "chapter_1_find_earphone_failed_final"
if !save_value.isEnableCamouflage:
        if !save_value.isGetEarphone:
                SetExposure(arg = 20)
                else:
                        SetExposure(arg = 15)
                        else:

                                        SetExposure(arg = 15)
                                        else:
                                                SetExposure(arg = 10)
```

```python
current_checkpoint = "chapter_1_punish_photo_failed"
ClearSubtitle()
maxSubDur = 0
MissionFailed()
if failReason == "notReady":
        if save_value.isGetEarphone:
                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_punish_photo_failed_abandon_earphone, color = colors.red)
                else:
                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_punish_photo_failed_abandon_msg)
                        elif failReason == "night":
                                if save_value.isGetEarphone:
                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_punish_photo_failed_night_earphone)
                                        else:
                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_punish_photo_failed_night_msg, notice = false)
                                                elif failReason == "rule":
                                                        if save_value.isGetEarphone:
                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_punish_photo_failed_rule_earphone, color = colors.red)
                                                                else:
                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_punish_photo_failed_rule_msg)
                                                                        elif failReason == "conditionBroke":
                                                                                if save_value.isGetEarphone:
                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_punish_photo_failed_abandon_earphone, color = colors.red)
                                                                                        else:
                                                                                                SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_punish_photo_failed_abandon_msg)
                                                                                                elif failReason == "areaTimeOut":
                                                                                                        if save_value.isGetEarphone:
                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_punish_photo_failed_timeout_earphone, color = colors.red)
                                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                                        SendMessageChat(msg = text_chapter_1_punish_photo_failed_timeout_msg)
                                                                                                                        elif failReason == "photo":
                                                                                                                                maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_punish_photo_failed_photo)
                                                                                                                                elif failReason == "lastPhotoTimeOut":
                                                                                                                                        maxSubDur = ShowSubtitle(text = text_chapter_1_punish_photo_failed_lastphoto)
                                                                                                                                        if maxSubDur > 0:
                                                                                                                                                sublistener = create_listener("listener_sub_await", maxSubDur = maxSubDur, nextcheckpoint = "chapter_1_punish_photo_failed_final")
                                                                                                                                                else:
                                                                                                                                                        thread.goto('chapter_1_punish_photo_failed_final')  # state transition

```

#### `ending_reset:` (14 行)

> 首行: `save_value.currentChapter = -1`

```python
save_value.currentChapter = -1
Log("currentChapter" + save_value.currentChapter )
current_checkpoint = "ending_reset"
if save_checkpoint != current_checkpoint:
        save_checkpoint = current_checkpoint
        SaveData(savecp = true)
        if global_result_listener == null:
                global_result_listener = create_listener("listener_global_daily_result")
                resetPanel = CreateMissionPanel()
                resetPanel.SetVisible(true)
```

```python
        q = q + "购物中心(" + _save.disThresShoppingMall + "m)\n"
        q = q + "最小转移间隔(" + _save.minTimeThres + "s)\n"
        q = q + "最大转移间隔(" + _save.maxTimeThres + "s)\n"

        mc.Add(q, "Left", silent=true)
        mc.SetButtons()
        listener = create_listener("waitHome")
        else:
                q = ""
                if sel == 0:
                        q = q + "*"

                        if sel == 1:
                                q = q + "*"
                                q = q + "综合公园(" + _save.disThresPark + "/80m)\n"
                                if sel == 2:
                                        q = q + "*"

                                        if sel == 3:
                                                q = q + "*"
                                                q = q + "公寓前(" + _save.disThresMansion + "/30m)\n"
                                                if sel == 4:

p = ""
if sel == 5:

                p = p + "*"

                        mc.Add(q + p, "Left", silent=true)
                        mc.SetButtons("[上]", "[+1]", "[+10]", "[-10]", "[-1]", "[下]")
                        listener = create_listener("waitClick")

```

#### `waitClick:` (18 行)

> 首行: `index = mc.Clicked()`

```python
index = mc.Clicked()
if index == 0:
        if sel > 0:
                sel = sel - 1
                elif index == 1:
                        updThres(no=sel, cnt=1)
                        elif index == 2:
                                updThres(no=sel, cnt=10)
                                elif index == 3:
                                        updThres(no=sel, cnt=-10)
                                        elif index == 4:
                                                updThres(no=sel, cnt=-1)
                                                elif index == 5:
                                                        if sel < 7:
                                                                sel = sel + 1
                                                                if index != null | _state.Position.stage != "Apart":
                                                                        thread.goto('redraw')  # state transition

```

## `main.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\肾虚真菜香--喝水和坐下恢复体力\main.code`

### 顶层代码 (on load)

```python

autoEcstasy = create_thread("autoEcstasy")

```

### 标签

#### `autoEcstasy:` (3 行)

> 首行: `thread = _this`

```python
thread = _this
thread.goto('main')  # state transition

```

#### `main:` (17 行)

> 首行: `prev = GetEcstasy()`

```python
prev = GetEcstasy()
prevOrgasm = false
prevStamina = GetStamina()
lastOrgasmTime = _time
maxSpeed = 1.0
minDistance = _settings.npcDistance
npcList = CreateList()
mp = CreateMissionPanel()
mp.SetGaugeVisible(false)

condRising = CreateCondition("(Action_OnaniNormal,Action_MituasiOnani,Action_OnaniNeGanimata,Action_OnaniYotuashi,Action_ChikubiRotate,Action_OnaniArmKuri,Action_OnaniSikoru,Action_UseDildoFloorPussy1,Action_UseDildoWallPussy1,Action_UseDildoFloorAnal1,Action_UseDildoWallAnal1,Action_UseDildoWallFella1,Action_SitDildo,Action_SexStandBack,Action_SexKijoui,[(VibrationLow,VibrationHigh,VibrationRandom),(AdultToy_Vibrator,AdultToy_TitRotor,AdultToy_KuriRotor)],[(PistonLow,PistonMedium,PistonHigh,PistonRandom),(AdultToy_PistonPussy,AdultToy_PistonAnal,AdultToy_PistonFuta)])")
condNoHandcuffs = CreateCondition("NoHandcuffs")
condNoExpose = CreateCondition("[!Exposed_Front,!Exposed_Upper,!Exposed_Hip]")

listener = create_listener("mainloop")
listenerStageChanged = create_listener("onStageChanged")

```

#### `mainloop:` (24 行)

> 首行: `prev = next`

```python
prev = next
prevOrgasm = _state.Orgasm
if _state.Orgasm && _settings.staminaDamage > 0:
        SetStamina(prevStamina)
        AddStamina(- _timediff * _state.StaminaMax * _settings.staminaDamage * 0.0032768)
        lastOrgasmTime = _time
        lockStamina = false
        if _settings.limitedStamina:
                lockStamina = true
                if _state.Sitting:
                        lockStamina = false
                        elif _state.Action == "DrinkWater":
                                lockStamina = false
                                elif condNoExpose.Check():
                                        lockStamina = false
                                        if !_state.Orgasm && _time < lastOrgasmTime + 2.0:
                                                lockStamina = true
                                                if lockStamina:
                                                        nextStamina = GetStamina()
                                                        if nextStamina > prevStamina:
                                                                nextStamina = prevStamina
                                                                SetStamina(nextStamina)
                                                                prevStamina = GetStamina()

```

#### `onStageChanged:` (5 行)

> 首行: `if _stagechanged`

```python
if _stagechanged:
        npcList = CreateList()


handleUseBuyMachine = create_thread("handleUseBuyMachine")
```

#### `handleUseBuyMachine:` (5 行)

> 首行: `thread = _this`

```python
thread = _this
thread.goto('waiting')  # state transition

prevNumWater = 0

```

#### `waiting:` (4 行)

> 首行: `if _settings.debug`

```python
if _settings.debug:
        Log("autoEcstasy: handleUseBuyMachine: waiting")
        listener = create_listener("mainLoopWaiting")

```

#### `mainLoopWaiting:` (11 行)

> 首行: `if _stagechanged`

```python
if _stagechanged:
        if _settings.zeroStart && _state.Position.laststage == "Apart":
                SetItemCount("Water", 0)
                if _settings.debug:
                        Log("autoEcstasy: handleUseBuyMachine: all Waters removed")
                        if _state.Action == "UseBuyMachine":
                                prevNumWater = GetItemCount("Water")
                                if _settings.debug:
                                        Log("autoEcstasy: handleUseBuyMachine: prevNumWater=" + prevNumWater)
                                        thread.goto('buying')  # state transition

```

#### `buying:` (4 行)

> 首行: `if _settings.debug`

```python
if _settings.debug:
        Log("autoEcstasy: handleUseBuyMachine: buying")
        listener = create_listener("mainLoopBuying")

```

#### `mainLoopBuying:` (20 行)

> 首行: `if _state.Action != "UseBuyMachine"`

```python
if _state.Action != "UseBuyMachine":
        numWater = GetItemCount("Water")
        if _settings.debug:
                Log("autoEcstasy: handleUseBuyMachine: numWater=" + numWater)

if numWater == prevNumWater:
        AddItemCount("Water", 1)
        numWater += 1
        if _settings.debug:
                Log("autoEcstasy: handleUseBuyMachine: water added")

if _settings.maxNumWater > 0:

if numWater > _settings.maxNumWater || _settings.instantMax:
        SetItemCount("Water", _settings.maxNumWater)
        if _settings.debug:
                Log("autoEcstasy: handleUseBuyMachine: numWater=" + _settings.maxNumWater)
                thread.goto('waiting')  # state transition


```

## `pageMain_.code`

### 标签

#### `pageMain_:` (7 行)

> 首行: `chatter = null`

```python
chatter = null
requestQueue = null
callList = CreateList("__processLevelUp","__processLevelDown","__processShowingRule")
buttons = CreateList(StringsPool2.UpLevelButtonString,StringsPool2.DownLevelButtonString,StringsPool2.RuleButtonString)

exitFlag = false

```

#### `init:` (8 行)

> 首行: `newChatter = _args[0]`

```python


newChatter = _args[0]
newRequestQueue = _args[1]
if newChatter != null && (newRequestQueue != null):
        chatter = newChatter
        requestQueue = newRequestQueue

```

#### `initUI:` (9 行)

> 首行: `if _state.Position.stage == "Apart"`

```python

if _state.Position.stage == "Apart":
        exitFlag = false
        chatter.Add(StringsPool1.InitChatterString,"Left",user = StringsPool2.LilithString, silent = true)
        chatter.Add(GetLevelDesc(_save.level,StringsPool1),"Left",user = StringsPool2.SystemString, silent = true)
        chatter.SetButtons(buttons)
        else:
                exitFlag = true

```

#### `updateUI:` (5 行)

> 首行: `buttonIndex = chatter.Clicked()`

```python

buttonIndex = chatter.Clicked()
if buttonIndex != null && (!exitFlag):
        CallFunction(callList[buttonIndex])

```

#### `tryNextPage:` (8 行)

> 首行: `if exitFlag`

```python


if exitFlag:
        if _state.Position.stage == "Apart":
                return "pageRule"
                else:
                        return "pageReady"

```

#### `__processLevelUp:` (13 行)

> 首行: `level = _save.level + 1`

```python
level = _save.level + 1
if level > _save.maxLevel:
        level = _save.maxLevel
        _save.level = level
        string = ""
        if _save.level == _save.maxLevel:
                string = string + StringsPool1.MaxLevelString
                else:
                        string = string + StringsPool1.UpLevelString
                        chatter.Clear()
                        chatter.Add(string,"Left",user = StringsPool2.LilithString, silent = true)
                        chatter.Add(GetLevelDesc(_save.level,StringsPool1),"Left",user = StringsPool2.SystemString, silent = true)

```

#### `__processLevelDown:` (8 行)

> 首行: `level = _save.level - 1`

```python
level = _save.level - 1
if level < 0:
        level = 0
        _save.level = level
        chatter.Clear()
        chatter.Add(StringsPool1.DownLevelString,"Left",user = StringsPool2.LilithString, silent = true)
        chatter.Add(GetLevelDesc(_save.level,StringsPool1),"Left",user = StringsPool2.SystemString, silent = true)

```

#### `__processShowingRule:` (3 行)

> 首行: `exitFlag = true`

```python
exitFlag = true
chatter.Clear()
chatter.Add(StringsPool1.CoreRuleString,"Left",user = StringsPool2.LilithString, silent = true)
```

## `pageMissionHelp_.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\Lilith's Fun\pageMissionHelp_.code`

### 标签

#### `pageMissionHelp_:` (6 行)

> 首行: `chatter = null`

```python
chatter = null
requestQueue = null

id2ButtonMap = create_thread("StaticDict")
exitFlag = false

```

#### `init:` (11 行)

> 首行: `newChatter = _args[0]`

```python


newChatter = _args[0]
newRequestQueue = _args[1]
if newChatter != null && (newRequestQueue != null):
        chatter = newChatter
        requestQueue = newRequestQueue
        id2ButtonMap.Insert(100, StringsPool2.HomeButtonString,)



```

#### `initUI:` (13 行)

> 首行: `if _state.Position.stage != "Apart"`

```python

if _state.Position.stage != "Apart":
        exitFlag = false
        chatter.Add(GetLevelDesc(_save.level,StringsPool1),"Left",user = StringsPool2.SystemString, silent = true)
        chatter.Add(StringsPool1.HelpString,"Left",user = StringsPool2.LilithString, silent = true)

id2ButtonMap.Insert(101, StringsPool2.PauseButtonString)
id2ButtonMap.Remove(102)
chatter.SetButtons(id2ButtonMap.GetValues(), ids = id2ButtonMap.GetKeys())
exitFlag = false
else:
        exitFlag = true

```

#### `updateUI:` (17 行)

> 首行: `buttonIndex = chatter.Clicked()`

```python

buttonIndex = chatter.Clicked()
button = id2ButtonMap.At(buttonIndex)
if button == StringsPool2.HomeButtonString:
        requestQueue.Enqueue("Home Failure")
        exitFlag = true
        elif button == StringsPool2.PauseButtonString:
                requestQueue.Enqueue("Pause Failure")
                id2ButtonMap.Remove(101)
                id2ButtonMap.Insert(102, StringsPool2.ContinueButtonString)
                chatter.SetButtons(id2ButtonMap.GetValues(), ids = id2ButtonMap.GetKeys())
                elif button == StringsPool2.ContinueButtonString:
                        requestQueue.Enqueue("Start")
                        id2ButtonMap.Insert(101, StringsPool2.PauseButtonString)
                        id2ButtonMap.Remove(102)
                        chatter.SetButtons(id2ButtonMap.GetValues(), ids = id2ButtonMap.GetKeys())

```

#### `tryNextPage:` (5 行)

> 首行: `if exitFlag`

```python
if _state.Position.stage != "Apart":
        backFlag = false
        nextFlag = false
        chatter.Add(StringsPool1.ReadyString,"Left",user = StringsPool2.LilithString, silent = true)
        chatter.Add(GetLevelDesc(_save.level,StringsPool1),"Left",user = StringsPool2.SystemString, silent = true)

```

#### `updateUI:` (10 行)

> 首行: `buttonIndex = chatter.Clicked()`

```python
buttonIndex = chatter.Clicked()
if buttonIndex != null && (!backFlag & !nextFlag):
        backFlag = false
        nextFlag = true
        requestQueue.Enqueue("Start")
        if _state.Position.stage == "Apart":
                backFlag = true
                nextFlag = false

```

```python
if (!_state.Orgasm) && (_state.Action == "None" || _state.Sitting):
        curVib = _state.Vibrator
        frontEx = _state.Exposed.Front
        upperEx = _state.Exposed.Upper
        allEx = _state.Exposed.All

                SetAction("StandUp")
                i = Foreach(vibratorTypes, b)
                if (curVib == 2 || curVib == 3) && (vibratorTypes[i] != null):
                        if frontEx | upperEx | allEx:

                                else:
                                        SetAction("OnaniArmKuri")
                                        else:
```

## `processorCallNpc_.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\Lilith's Fun\processorCallNpc_.code`

### 标签

#### `processorCallNpc_:` (19 行)

> 首行: `stages = Copy(Stages)`

```python








stages = Copy(Stages)
lockMarks = create_thread("StaticDict")
tracers = __createTracers()
tracerIds = CreateList()

timer = 0
correctTimer = 0
caughtFlag = false
lastPosition = null
lastAlterness = 0

```

#### `start:` (9 行)

> 首行: `ps.setDisable(true)`

```python


ps.setDisable(true)
Foreach(stages, ps)
timer = 0
correctTimer = 0
caughtFlag = false


```

#### `end:` (9 行)

> 首行: `ps.setDisable(false)`

```python


ps.setDisable(false)
Foreach(stages, ps)
__resetTracers()
Foreach(tracerIds, tir)
ClearList(tracerIds)


```

#### `update:` (24 行)

> 首行: `event = _args[0]`

```python


event = _args[0]
curStage = _state.Position.stage
tracer = tracers.At(curStage)
if _stagechanged:
        ClearList(tracerIds)
        if (!_stagechanged) && (tracer != null):
                if tracer.npc == null:
                        if tracer.start == null:
                                tracer.start = LocatePlayer()

if tracer.timer >= __adjustSpawnDelay(event):
        tracer.npc = __createNpc(tracer.start, event)
        else:
                tracer.timer += _timediff
                else:
                        if tracer.npc.IsAlive():
                                __tryCorrectPosition(tracer.npc, event)
                                __tryCatch(tracer.npc, event)
                                else:
                                        __respawn(tracer.npc, event)
                                        Foreach(stages, pw)

```

#### `__createTracers:` (10 行)

> 首行: `tracers = CreateThread("StaticDict")`

```python

tracers = create_thread("StaticDict")
i = 0
len = stages.Count()
while i < len:
        tracers.Insert(stages[i], CreateList(npc = null, timer = 0, start = null))
        i += 1
        tracers.Remove("Apart")
        return tracers

```

#### `__resetTracers:` (11 行)

> 首行: `i=0`

```python
i = 0
len = stages.Count()
while i < len:
        tracer = tracers.At(stages[i])
        if tracer != null:
                tracer.npc = null
                tracer.timer = 0
                tracer.start = null
                i += 1
                tracers.Remove("Apart")

```

#### `__createNpc:` (17 行)

> 首行: `start = _args[0]`

```python

start = _args[0]
event = _args[1]

npc = CreateNPC("NewMale", position = start)





npc.TracePlayer(true)
npc.Speed(event.speed)
npc.Size(1.2)
tracerIds.Insert(npc.GetID())
Runtime.CustomNpcIds.Insert(npc.GetID())
return npc

```

#### `__respawn:` (10 行)

> 首行: `npc = _args[0]`

```python

npc = _args[0]
event = _args[1]
npc.Respawn()
npc.TracePlayer(true)
npc.Speed(event.speed)
npc.Size(1.2)
tracerIds.Insert(npc.GetID())
Runtime.CustomNpcIds.Insert(npc.GetID())

```

#### `__tryCorrectPosition:` (26 行)

> 首行: `npc = _args[0]`

```python

npc = _args[0]
event = _args[1]
if lastPosition == null:
        lastPosition = LocateNpc(npc.GetPosition())
        else:
                curAlertness = npc.Strangeness()
                if curAlertness < 1:
                        if correctTimer > event.caughtTime * 3:
                                v1 = LocateNpc(npc.GetPosition())
                                v2 = LocatePlayer()
                                dir = Vector3Sub(v2, v1)
                                delta = Vector3Scale(dir, event.speed/Vector3Length(dir))
                                npc.Warp(position = Vector3Add(v1, delta))
                                correctTimer = 0
                                else:
                                        curPosition = LocateNpc(npc.GetPosition())
                                        if (lastAlterness >= curAlertness) && (Vector3SqrLength(Vector3Sub(lastPosition, curPosition)) < (event.speed * _timediff * 0.5) ** 2):
                                                correctTimer += _timediff
                                                else:
                                                        correctTimer -= _timediff
                                                        if correctTimer < 0:
                                                                correctTimer = 0
                                                                lastPosition = LocateNpc(npc.GetPosition())
                                                                lastAlterness = curAlertness

```

#### `__tryCatch:` (19 行)

> 首行: `npc = _args[0]`

```python

npc = _args[0]
event = _args[1]
v1 = LocateNpc(npc.GetPosition())
v2 = LocatePlayer()
sqrD = SqrDistance(v1, v2)
if timer >= event.caughtTime:
        caughtFlag = true
        npc.TracePlayer(false)
        npc.Strangeness(1.1)
        else:
                if npc.SeesPlayer() && (sqrD <= event.caughtRadius ** 2):
                        timer += _timediff
                        else:
                                timer -= _timediff * 0.5
                                if timer < 0:
                                        timer = 0
                                        npc.Strangeness(timer/event.caughtTime)

```

#### `__adjustSpawnDelay:` (14 行)

> 首行: `event = _args[0]`

```python


event = _args[0]
if (_state.Position.stage == "Convenience" || _state.Position.stage == "FashionShop"):
        spawnDelay = event.spawnDelay
        duration = event.common.duration

delta = duration - spawnDelay

spawnDelay += delta * 0.5
return spawnDelay
else:
        return event.spawnDelay

```

#### `portalSetter:` (1 行)

> 首行: `disable = false`

```python
disable = false
```

#### `do:` (11 行)

> 首行: `if disable`

```python
if disable:
        cRankLimit = GetStageRankLimit(value)
        if cRankLimit <= 7:
                lockMarks.Insert(value, cRankLimit)
                SetStageRankLimit(value, 10)
                else:
                        lockMarks.Insert(value, -1)
                        else:
                                oRankLimit = lockMarks.At(value)
                                if (oRankLimit != null) && (oRankLimit >= 0):
                                        SetStageRankLimit(value, oRankLimit)
```

#### `setDisable:` (2 行)

> 首行: `disable = _args[0]`

```python

ps = create_thread("portalSetter")
```


> 首行: `cRankLimit = GetStageRankLimit(value)`

```python
if cRankLimit <= 7:

lockMarks.Insert(value, cRankLimit)
SetStageRankLimit(value, 10)
pw = create_thread("portalWatcher")
```

## `processorEcstasyCurse_.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\Lilith's Fun\processorEcstasyCurse_.code`

### 标签

#### `processorEcstasyCurse_:` (9 行)

> 首行: `timer = 0`

```python








timer = 0
```

#### `start:` (4 行)

> 首行: `timer = 0`

```python


timer = 0

```

#### `end:` (3 行)

```python



```

#### `update:` (19 行)

> 首行: `event = _args[0]`

```python


event = _args[0]
if timer >= event.interval:
        event = _args[0]
        totalWeight = event.negWeight + event.posWeight + event.stayWeight
        r = Random(0, totalWeight)
        rate = 0
        progress = 0
        progress = progress + event.negWeight
        if progress >= r:
                rate = __calcRate(event.maxNegRate)
                else:
                        progress = progress + event.posWeight
                        if progress >= rate:
                                rate = __calcRate(event.maxPosRate)
                                AddEcstasy(rate * _timediff)
                                timer = timer +_timediff

```

#### `__calcRate:` (7 行)

> 首行: `maxRate = _args[0]`

```python


maxRate = _args[0]
a = Random(1, 6)
a = 1 / a
return a * maxRate

```

## `processorNpcNotice_.code`

### 标签

#### `processorNpcNotice_:` (15 行)

> 首行: `timer = 0`

```python





timer = 0
interval = 0.5

flag = false

finished = 0

targetStage = ""
lockMark = -1

```

#### `start:` (8 行)

> 首行: `timer = 0`

```python


timer = 0
flag = false
finished = 0
targetStage = _state.Position.stage
lockMark = -1

```

#### `__process:` (9 行)

> 首行: `npc = _args[0]`

```python

npc = _args[0]
event = _args[1]
npc.TracePlayer(true)
if (_state.Position.stage == "Convenience" || _state.Position.stage == "FashionShop"):
        npc.Speed(npc.Speed() * event.speedFactor * 0.5)
        else:
                npc.Speed(npc.Speed() * event.speedFactor)

```

#### `end:` (5 行)

> 首行: `if lockMark >= 0`

```python


if lockMark >= 0:
        SetStageRankLimit(targetStage, lockMark)

```

#### `update:` (56 行)

> 首行: `event = _args[0]`

```python


event = _args[0]

if _stagechanged:
        cStage = _state.Position.stage
        lastStage = _state.Position.laststage
        if cStage == targetStage:
                if lockMark >= 0:
                        SetStageRankLimit(targetStage, lockMark)
                        lockMark = -1
                        flag = false
                        finished = 0
                        elif lastStage == targetStage:
                                cRank = GetStageRankLimit(targetStage)
                                if cRank <= 7:
                                        lockMark = cRank
                                        SetStageRankLimit(targetStage, 10)
                                        else:
                                                lockMark = -1
                                                flag = true
                                                else:
                                                        cStage = _state.Position.stage
                                                        if cStage != targetStage:
                                                                cRank = GetStageRankLimit(targetStage)
                                                                if cRank <= 7:
                                                                        lockMark = cRank
                                                                        SetStageRankLimit(targetStage, 10)

if timer >= interval:
        timer = 0
        if finished >= event.num:
                flag = true
                if !flag:
                        npcInfos = Copy(_state.NPCs)
                        count = npcInfos.Count()
                        i = 0
                        while i < event.num:
                                if count == 0:
                                        i = event.num
                                        else:
                                                r = RandomInt(0, count)
                                                npcInfo = npcInfos[r]
                                                id = npcInfo.ID

if !Runtime.LocalTracerIds.Contains(id) && !Runtime.CustomNpcIds.Contains(id) && npcInfo.FixedType == "None" && !npcInfo.Sitting && npcInfo.State != "Interact":
        npc = CreateNPC(id)
        Runtime.LocalTracerIds.Insert(id)
        __process(npc, event)
        finished += 1
        npcInfos.Remove(index = r)
        count -= 1
        i += 1
        else:
                timer += _timediff

```

---


#### `alertUp:` (2 行)

> 首行: `event = null`

```python
event = null
npc = null
```

#### `do:` (25 行)

> 首行: `if npcs.ContainsKey(value.ID)`

```python
if npcs.ContainsKey(value.ID):
        npc = npcs.At(value.ID)
        elif !Runtime.CustomNpcIds.Contains(value.ID):
                npc = CreateNPC(value.ID)
                if npc.IsAlive():
                        npcs.Insert(value.ID, npc)
                        else:
                                npcs.Remove(value.ID)
                                npc = null
                                if npc != null:
                                        v1 = LocateNpc(value.Position)
                                        v2 = LocatePlayer()
                                        sqrD = SqrDistance(v1, v2)
                                        seeFlag = npc.SeesPlayer()
                                        if seeFlag || (sqrD < 25):
                                                curStrangeness = npc.Strangeness()
                                                if curStrangeness < event.minStrangeness:
                                                        curStrangeness = event.minStrangeness
                                                        if sqrD < event.alterDistance ** 2:
                                                                curStrangeness += event.extraDelta * _timediff * 0.15
                                                                curStrangeness += event.extraDelta * _timediff
                                                                if !seeFlag && (curStrangeness >= 0.98):
                                                                        curStrangeness = 0.98
                                                                        npc.Strangeness(curStrangeness)

```

#### `setEvent:` (3 行)

> 首行: `event = _args[0]`

```python

au = create_thread("alertUp")

```


#### `update:` (22 行)

> 首行: `event = _args[0]`

```python


event = _args[0]
if !event.exclusive.Contains(_state.Action) && !event.exclusive.Contains(event.action):
        if durationTimer <= 0:
                if timer >= event.interval:
                        timer = 0
                        r = Random()
                        if r < event.chance:
                                durationTimer = event.duration
                                else:
                                        timer = timer + _timediff
                                        else:
                                                durationTimer = durationTimer - _timediff
                                                if _state.Action != event.action:
                                                        if _state.Sitting:
                                                                SetAction("StandUp")
                                                                if _state.Crouching:
                                                                        SetAction("None")
                                                                        SetAction(event.action)


```


#### `update:` (23 行)

> 首行: `event = _args[0]`

```python


event = _args[0]
if timer >= event.interval:
        timer = 0
        r = Random()
        if r <= event.chance:
                flag = true
                curStage = _state.Position.stage
                stages.Remove(curStage)
                rStage = stages.Random()
                stages.Insert(curStage)
                if _state.Sitting:
                        SetAction("StandUp")
                        SetStage(rStage)
                        if _stagechanged & flag:
                                flag = false
                                rPos = GetRandomPosition()

                                        SetPlayerPosition(x=rPos["x"], y=rPos["y"], z=rPos["z"], rx=0, ry=0, rz=0, rw=1)
```

## `processorTrimCosplays_.code`

**路径**: `docs\examples\Lilith's Fun\processorTrimCosplays_.code`

### 标签

#### `processorTrimCosplays_:` (11 行)

> 首行: `interval = 1`

```python






interval = 1
timer = interval
tempList = CreateList()
trimList = CreateList()

```

#### `start:` (6 行)

> 首行: `timer = 0`

```python


timer = 0
tempList.Remove(index = 0, count = tempList.Count())
trimList.Remove(index = 0, count = trimList.Count())

```

#### `end:` (3 行)

```python



```

#### `update:` (27 行)

> 首行: `if timer >= interval`

```python


if timer >= interval:
        timer = 0
        event = _args[0]
        curCount = _state.Cosplay.Count()
        keepCount = 30 - event.trimCount
        if keepCount <= 0:
                curCount = 0
                keepCount = 0
                UnequipAllCosplay()
                else:
                        i = 0
                        tempList.Remove(index = 0, count = tempList.Count())
                        trimList.Remove(index = 0, count = trimList.Count())
                        while i < curCount:
                                tempList.Insert(_state.Cosplay[i])
                                i = i + 1
                                i = 0
                                while curCount > keepCount:
                                        r = RandomInt(0, curCount)
                                        trimList.Insert(tempList[r])
                                        tempList.Remove(r)
                                        curCount = curCount - 1
                                        UnequipCosplay(trimList)
                                        timer = timer + _timediff

```

#### `InitDailyResultUI:` (72 行)

```python

tempUI = CreateList()



ui_stats_x = 0.5
ui_stats_y_start = 0.65
ui_line_height = 0.06


ui_title_size = 60
ui_stats_size = 45


ui_default_color = colors.white


UItitle = CreateText()
UIexposure = CreateText()
UIindulgence = CreateText()


tempUITitle = CreateText()
tempUIExposure = CreateText()
tempUIIndulgence = CreateText()

tempUIAnger = CreateText()
tempUIDiscovered = CreateText()
tempUIMoney = CreateText()
tempUIClues = CreateText()




tempUITitle.SetAnchor(0.5, 0.75)
tempUITitle.SetAlignment("Center")
tempUITitle.SetSize(ui_title_size)


if abc = true:
        tempUIAnger.SetAnchor(ui_stats_x, ui_stats_y_start)
        tempUIAnger.SetAlignment("Center")
        tempUIAnger.SetSize(ui_stats_size)

tempUIExposure.SetAnchor(ui_stats_x, ui_stats_y_start - ui_line_height * 1)
tempUIExposure.SetAlignment("Center")
tempUIExposure.SetSize(ui_stats_size)

tempUIIndulgence.SetAnchor(ui_stats_x, ui_stats_y_start - ui_line_height * 2)
tempUIIndulgence.SetAlignment("Center")
tempUIIndulgence.SetSize(ui_stats_size)

tempUIDiscovered.SetAnchor(ui_stats_x, ui_stats_y_start - ui_line_height * 3)
tempUIDiscovered.SetAlignment("Center")
tempUIDiscovered.SetSize(ui_stats_size)

tempUIMoney.SetAnchor(ui_stats_x, ui_stats_y_start - ui_line_height * 4)
tempUIMoney.SetAlignment("Center")
tempUIMoney.SetSize(ui_stats_size)

tempUIClues.SetAnchor(ui_stats_x, ui_stats_y_start - ui_line_height * 5)
tempUIClues.SetAlignment("Center")
tempUIClues.SetSize(ui_stats_size)

Global("result_ui_title", tempUITitle)
Global("result_ui_exposure", tempUIExposure)
Global("result_ui_indulgence", tempUIIndulgence)
Global("result_ui_anger", tempUIAnger)
Global("result_ui_discovered", tempUIDiscovered)
Global("result_ui_money", tempUIMoney)
Global("result_ui_clues", tempUIClues)

```

#### `ShowDailyResult:` (40 行)

> 首行: `uiDisplayDuration = 6`

```python

uiDisplayDuration = 6
uiFadeIn = 0.5
uiFadeOut = 0.5


save_value.day = save_value.day + 1
currentDay = save_value.day

exposureCurrent = save_value.exposure
indulgenceCurrent = save_value.indulgence








titleText = Format("第 {0} 天 结算", currentDay)
titleColor = colors.yellow


exposureText = Format("塞雷卡曝光度：{0}%", exposureCurrent)
exposureColor = colors.white






indulgenceText = Format("塞雷卡放纵度：{0}%", indulgenceCurrent)
indulgenceColor = colors.purple

result_ui_title.Add(text = titleText, duration = uiDisplayDuration, fadein = uiFadeIn, fadeout = uiFadeOut, facecolor = titleColor)
result_ui_exposure.Add(text = exposureText, duration = uiDisplayDuration, fadein = uiFadeIn, fadeout = uiFadeOut, facecolor = exposureColor)
result_ui_indulgence.Add(text = indulgenceText, duration = uiDisplayDuration, fadein = uiFadeIn, fadeout = uiFadeOut, facecolor = indulgenceColor)
save_value.canDailyResult = false


```

#### `listener_global_daily_result:` (14 行)

> 首行: `if save_value.canDailyResult`

```python
if save_value.canDailyResult:
        if global_sleep_interact_area == null:
                global_sleep_interact_area = CreateInteractArea(stage = coord_apart_result.stage, x = coord_apart_result.x, y = coord_apart_result.y, z = coord_apart_result.z, r = coord_apart_result.r, text = text_coord_apart_result_sleep)
                if global_sleep_interact_area.Check():
                        if save_value.currentChapter == (-1):
                                ResetData()
                                main.goto('prologue_cp1_start')  # state transition
                                else:
                                        ShowDailyResult()
                                        main.goto('result_await')  # state transition
                                        elif global_sleep_interact_area != null:
                                                global_sleep_interact_area = null


```

#### `listener_result_await:` (12 行)

> 首行: `if isInit == null`

```python
if isInit == null:
        isInit = true
        duration = 0
        duration = duration + _timediff
        if duration >= 7:
                if save_value.exposure >= 100:
                        thread.goto('ending_exposure_assign')  # state transition
                        elif save_value.currentChapter == 0:
                                thread.goto('prologue_result_assign')  # state transition
                                else:
                                        SendNotice(text = text_daily_result_error, duration = 5, mode = notice_mode.both, color = colors.red)

```

#### `EnableDailyResult:` (3 行)

> 首行: `save_value.canDailyResult = true`

```python
save_value.canDailyResult = true
SendNotice(text = text_daily_result_enabled, duration = 5, mode = notice_mode.panel)

```

> 首行: `save_value.canDailyResult = false`


```python
baseRpBoard.Add(text = baseRpString, duration = (-1), facecolor = startColor)
```

#### `triggerCalc:` (16 行)

> 首行: `rp = _args[0]`

```python


rp = _args[0]
if calcBoard == null:
        calcBoard = __createCalcBoard()
        string = ""
        if rp <= 0:
                failureCalcRp = _args[1]
                string = string + Format("{0:F2}RP", (-rp)) + StringsPool1.FailureString
                if failureCalcRp != null:
                        string = string + "\n" + StringsPool1.FailureCalcString + Format("{0:F2}RP", failureCalcRp)
                        calcBoard.Add(text = string, duration = 6, facecolor = failureColor)
                        else:
                                string = string + Format("{0:F2}RP",rp) + StringsPool1.CalcString
                                calcBoard.Add(text = string, duration = 6, facecolor = calcColor)

```

#### `flush:` (36 行)

> 首行: `if timer >= interval`

```python

if timer >= interval:
        uRp = _args[0]
        baseRp = _args[1]
        multiplier = _args[2]
        totalRp = _args[3]

uRpString = Format("{0:F4} 倍率RP",uRp)
baseRpString = Format("{0:F4} 基础RP",baseRp)
multiplierString = Format("{0:F4} 多倍乘区",multiplier)
totalRpString = Format("{0:F4} 合计RP",totalRp)

flag = !flag

d = (-1)
if !flag:
        uRpBoard.Add(text = uRpString, duration = d, facecolor = __colorLerp(startColor, uRpMaxColor, uRp/uRpMax))
        baseRpBoard.Add(text = baseRpString, duration = d, facecolor = __colorLerp(startColor, endColor, baseRp/15))
        multiplierBoard.Add(text = multiplierString, duration = d, facecolor = __colorLerp(startColor, endColor, multiplier/15))
        totalRpBoard.Add(text = totalRpString, duration = d, facecolor = totalRpColor)
        uRpBoard0.Clear()
        baseRpBoard0.Clear()
        multiplierBoard0.Clear()
        totalRpBoard0.Clear()
        else:
                uRpBoard0.Add(text = uRpString, duration = d, facecolor = __colorLerp(startColor, uRpMaxColor, uRp/uRpMax))
                baseRpBoard0.Add(text = baseRpString, duration = d, facecolor = __colorLerp(startColor, endColor, baseRp/15))
                multiplierBoard0.Add(text = multiplierString, duration = d, facecolor = __colorLerp(startColor, endColor, multiplier/15))
                totalRpBoard0.Add(text = totalRpString, duration = d, facecolor = totalRpColor)
                uRpBoard.Clear()
                baseRpBoard.Clear()
                multiplierBoard.Clear()
                totalRpBoard.Clear()
                timer = 0
                timer = timer + _timediff

```

#### `__colorLerp:` (19 行)

> 首行: `colorOrigin = _args[0]`

```python


colorOrigin = _args[0]
colorTarget = _args[1]
factor = _args[2]

colorOR = colorOrigin.r
colorOG = colorOrigin.g
colorOB = colorOrigin.b

colorTR = colorTarget.r
colorTG = colorTarget.g
colorTB = colorTarget.b

r = colorOR + (colorTR - colorOR) * factor
g = colorOG + (colorTG - colorOG) * factor
b = colorOB + (colorTB - colorOB) * factor

return Color(r,g,b)
```

```python
timer = 0
interval = 1

maxCosNum = 30
cosKeepNum = 8

uRp = 0
uRpMax = 1.5
multiplier = 1
baseRp = 0
totalRp = 0


uRpDeltaCorrect = 1
multiplierCorrect = 1
baseRpCorrect = 1


failureCalcRate = 0.35

skipCondition = create_thread("defautConditon_")

rewardTxetTrigger = create_thread("rewarderTxetTrigger_")
rewardTxetTrigger.setURpMax(uRpMax)

failureCalcCondition = create_thread("defautConditon_")
punishCondition = create_thread("defautConditon_")


vn = 0
pn = 0
cn = 0
cnf = 0
klf = 0

exposed = "None"
pistonNum = 0
vibratorNum = 0
adultToyNum = 0
baseExposedFlag = false
allExposedFlag = false

killerLevel = 0

clacFlag = false

blockFlag = true

ready = true


```

#### `forceFailureCalc:` (4 行)

> 首行: `AddCurrentRP(failureCalcRate * totalRp)`

```python
AddCurrentRP(failureCalcRate * totalRp)
rewardTxetTrigger.triggerCalc((-totalRp) * (1 - failureCalcRate), failureCalcRate * totalRp)
__reset()
clacFlag = true
```

#### `forcePunishmentCalc:` (3 行)

```python
__reset()
clacFlag = true
```
